name: Aanandjit Sunderaj
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Aanandjit Sunderaj is a Managing Director and leads our office in Saudi Arabia, in addition to being responsible for investor relations for Brookfield’s private equity funds in the Middle East. Mr. Sunderaj joined Brookfield in 2012 in the real estate team based out of Mumbai. He then moved to Singapore and built out the operations platform for Asia Pacific and then subsequently to Dubai and built the Middle East platform. Prior to Brookfield, he held various roles in investments and portfolio management. Mr. Sunderaj holds a Master of Science degree from Columbia University and a Master of Business Administration degree from Moravian University.

name: Aaron Kline
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Aaron Kline is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group and is the Global Head of Tax for Brookfield Asset Management. In these roles, he leads the groups’ global tax functions, including tax planning and strategy, risk management, tax authority audits and compliance. Mr. Kline joined Brookfield in 2009 and previously held several tax-related positions in Brookfield’s Corporate, Private Equity and Infrastructure Groups. Prior to joining Brookfield, he worked in the tax practice of a global public accounting firm. Mr. Kline holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from York University and is a member of the Canadian Institute of Chartered Professional Accountants.

name: Aditya Joshi
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Aditya Joshi is a Managing Partner and the Head of Private Equity for the Asia-Pacific region across India, China, Australia and the Middle East. In this role, he is responsible for deal sourcing and execution, as well as portfolio monitoring. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Joshi was a principal at a global private equity firm where he was involved in deals in the healthcare, technology services and financial services sectors. Previously, he worked at another global private equity firm covering technology and business services, and at a global investment bank focusing on fundraising and M&A across various industries. Mr. Joshi holds a Master of Business Administration degree from The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania, and a Bachelor’s degree from the University of Pune. He is a Chartered Accountant, a member of The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India and a member of FICCI’s National Committee on Private Equity for India.

name: Adrian Foley
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Adrian Foley is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, as well as President and Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield Residential. He is responsible for the management and strategic direction of the Land & Housing and Development business lines in North America. Mr. Foley has held several roles across the organization since joining Brookfield Homes in 1996. He has served on the executive team for Brookfield Residential, Brookfield’s flagship residential property company, since 2011. Mr. Foley holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Greenwich.

name: Adrian Letts
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Adrian Letts is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group and Head of Business Operations, where he is responsible for operational and financial oversight of portfolio companies globally. This includes guiding the strategic allocation of the firm’s operational resources, while generating financial, operational and investment insights from the Brookfield ecosystem. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Letts held various senior leadership roles including CEO of a U.K. retail energy company and Managing Director of a leading global retailer’s online business, as well as several senior management positions in the telecom, media and technology industries. Mr. Letts holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Sydney and the Chartered Financial Analyst designation. Featured Content News Fund Shack OCT 2025 Adrian Letts on Brookfield’s operating engine Podcast | 21:19 Anuj Ranjan, Katie Zorbas, Adrian Letts JUL 2025 Identify Value, Buy for Value, Create Value: A Private Equity Update

name: Adrienne Moore
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Adrienne Moore is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, she leads the legal function within the group’s U.S. asset management team and is responsible for the legal aspects of transaction execution. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Moore was an associate at a leading Canadian law firm. Ms. Moore holds a law degree from Osgoode Hall Law School of York University and a Bachelor of Science degree from Acadia University.

name: Agostino De Gasperis
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Agostino De Gasperis is a Managing Director in Brookfield Wealth Solutions. In this role, he is responsible for the human resources function. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. De Gasperis was an independent consultant providing advisory services to mid-sized, owner managed firms. Before that he served in a variety of financial, human resource and corporate management roles at Anheuser-Busch and Labatt Breweries of Canada. He began his career in the Toronto offices of KPMG. Mr. De Gasperis holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Toronto and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Aisha Sheikh
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Aisha Sheikh is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Corporate Group. In this role, she works closely with global business groups and technology teams across project management, global service delivery, unified communications and IT communications, and training for Brookfield global technology initiatives. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2007, Ms. Sheikh worked in technology at a leading law firm. Ms. Sheikh holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Stony Brook University and a Master of Science degree from Pace University.

name: A.J. Markowski
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: A.J. Markowski is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he focuses on origination, analysis, execution and portfolio management of non-control investments across a variety of sectors. Mr. Markowski has also led corporate business development initiatives for Brookfield Asset Management and serves on the boards of several portfolio companies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Markowski worked in the investment banking division of a global investment bank. Mr. Markowski holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from the Ivey Business School at Western University.

name: A.J. Silber
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: A.J. Silber is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is responsible for various legal, regulatory and corporate governance functions for our business, the Brookfield Business Corporation board and many of our portfolio companies. Mr. Silber joined Brookfield in 2012 and was previously responsible for legal matters relating to Brookfield Asset Management, including corporate finance, securities, corporate actions and governance. Prior to Brookfield, he worked at the law firms Torys LLP in Toronto and Ropes & Gray LLP in New York. Mr. Silber holds a joint Juris Doctor/Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Toronto and a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McGill University. Mr. Silber is called to the Bar of Ontario and New York.

name: Alan Fleming
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Alan Fleming is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he oversees investor relations for Brookfield Business Corporation and leads the financial planning and strategic forecasting function for the Private Equity Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Fleming was a senior equity research analyst at Citigroup where he focused on coverage of the U.S. industrials sector. Mr. Fleming holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the New York University Stern School of Business and a Bachelor of Science degree from the Pennsylvania State University.

name: Alan Norris
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Alan Norris is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, as well as Executive Chair of Brookfield Properties’ development group in North America. Mr. Norris joined Brookfield when Carma Developers merged with Brookfield Homes to create Brookfield Residential, its North American residential property company in 2011. Mr. Norris joined Carma in 1983 and became its Chief Executive Officer in 1994, a role he retired from at the end of 2021. Mr. Norris holds a bachelor’s degree in accounting and economics and chartered accountant designations in Scotland and Canada.

name: Alberto Nin Garaizabal
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Alberto Nin Garaizabal is a Managing Partner and Head of Southern Europe for Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads business development and investment activities across the region, including Spain, Portugal, Italy and Greece. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Nin Garaizabal had worked at H.I.G. Capital as part of its distressed and real estate investment team. Previously he worked for UBS Investment Bank, where he focused on M&A, equity and debt transactions across several sectors, asset classes and jurisdictions. Mr. Nin Garaizabal holds a Business degree from Universidad Francisco de Vitoria and has been a professor at the Instituto de Empresa Business School since 2016. Featured Content Podcast | 24:59 Ruban Kaneshamoorthy, Alberto Nin Garaizabal JUL 2025 Deal Debrief: Livensa & Aveo

name: Aleks Novakovic
title: Managing Partner | Brookfield Corporation
bio: Aleks Novakovic is the Head of Strategic Initiatives for Brookfield Corporation. In this role, he is responsible for the advancement and execution of the company’s strategic initiatives. Since joining Brookfield in 2004, Mr. Novakovic has held senior management positions and spearheaded several corporate initiatives, including the establishment and launch of Brookfield Wealth Solutions Ltd., Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. and numerous other publicly listed Brookfield affiliates. Mr. Novakovic holds a Bachelor of Accounting degree from Brock University and qualified as a Chartered Professional Accountant in Ontario.

name: Alex Elawadi
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Alex Elawadi is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and Head of Acquisitions for North America. In this role, he focuses on transactions across property types, capital formation, and portfolio management through several of Brookfield’s portfolio-company boards. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Elawadi held positions in investments and asset management at The Carlyle Group and Rockwood Capital and began his career in real estate investment banking at Bank of America Merrill Lynch. Mr. Elawadi holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Columbia University and a Bachelor of Science degree from Virginia Tech.

name: Alex Yang
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Alex Yang is a Managing Partner and head of East Asia for Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. He is responsible for the origination, execution and operation of investments in the region including Japan, Korea, Greater China and Southeast Asia. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Yang held senior positions at global private equity groups based in Hong Kong and Beijing. Prior to Mr. Yang's career in private equity, he held positions in New York in investment banking and practiced as a private equity attorney in Chicago in a global law firm. Mr. Yang holds a juris doctor degree from the University of Minnesota Law School, a Master of Business Administration from the University of Chicago, and a Bachelor of Laws degree from Peking University.

name: Alexandra Cohl
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Alexandra Cohl is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Infrastructure Group. In this role, she leads acquisition financing and capital markets activity for Brookfield’s infrastructure platform. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Ms. Cohl worked for a Canadian bank where she most recently held a director role in debt capital markets. Ms. Cohl holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McGill University.

name: Alexis Prevot
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Alexis Prevot is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for sourcing, execution and asset management of real estate secondary investments and special situations in Europe. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Prevot was Chief Investment Officer of Immobel SA, a European-listed real estate developer. He previously served as Senior Portfolio Manager at the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority, where he focused on Western Europe real estate investment strategy across all asset classes. Mr. Prevot holds a Master of Business Administration degree from London Business School and a Diplome d’Ingénieur from Ecole des Ingénieurs de la Ville de Paris.

name: Alfredo Zamarriego
title: Vice Chair | Infrastructure
bio: Alfredo Zamarriego is a Vice Chair in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. Mr. Zamarriego joined Brookfield in 2014 and facilitated the opening of its Madrid office, where he is currently based, helping to establish the Firm’s presence in continental Europe. He previously held several senior positions in investment banking and private equity within the infrastructure industry in Europe. Mr. Zamarriego holds a Law degree and a Bachelor’s degree in Economics from the ICADE University in Madrid.

name: Alison Giampa
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Alison Giampa is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for portfolio and transaction management globally for the real estate secondaries business. Previously, she held roles within the capital markets team and the real estate debt fund. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2008, Ms. Giampa worked at Morgan Stanley where she was responsible for the structuring, underwriting and legal coordination of its warehouse lending program. Ms. Giampa holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Syracuse University. Featured Content Commentary Christopher Reilly, Fabian Neuenschwander, Alison Giampa, Marcus Day APR 2025 Providing liquidity and enhancing value: The case for GP-led capital solutions

name: Alper Daglioglu
title: Managing Partner | Head of Investment Solutions Group
bio: Alper Daglioglu is a Managing Partner and Head of Brookfield’s Investment Solutions Group. In this role, he leads the efforts to deliver innovative solutions to global institutional, private wealth and family capital clients by developing tailored multi-asset portfolio solutions that leverage Brookfield’s full suite of investment capabilities across energy, infrastructure, private equity, real estate and credit. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Mr. Daglioglu spent more than two decades at Morgan Stanley in various roles. He most recently served as Head of Portfolio and Investment Manager Solutions, which encompassed all asset manager research, portfolio solutions, family investments, private markets and an outsourced CIO business, among other responsibilities. Mr. Daglioglu holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Isenberg School of Management at the University of Massachusetts Amherst and a Bachelor of Science degree from Galatasaray University. He is a Chartered Alternative Investment Analyst charterholder. Featured Content White Paper Alper Daglioglu APR 2026 The allocation evolution: The emergence of total portfolio approach investing Podcast | 24:43 Alper Daglioglu, Howard Marks FEB 2026 Offense or Defense? Positioning Portfolios in Today's Market

name: Amanda Laszutko
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Amanda Laszutko is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, she is responsible for Strategic Initiatives, including leading fundraising, new product strategy and co-investment activity for the group, as well as other third-party equity initiatives. Ms. Laszutko previously served in Brookfield’s Infrastructure business, holding roles in both Strategic Initiatives and Investments. Prior to rejoining Brookfield in 2022, Ms. Laszutko worked on the investments team at OMERS Infrastructure, where she was responsible for the origination and execution of direct investment opportunities. She began her career at PwC in transaction services. Ms. Laszutko holds a Bachelor of Business Administration from the Schulich School of Business at York University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Amanda Marshall
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Amanda Marshall is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, she leads the group’s global tax function, including tax planning and strategy, risk management, tax authority audits and compliance. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Ms. Marshall was a partner in M&A tax services at a professional services firm. Ms. Marshall holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University and is a member of the Canadian Institute of Chartered Professional Accountants.

name: Amy Lancaster
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Amy Lancaster is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Real Estate Group. In this role, she leads portfolio management and capital markets for the Brookfield’s North American hotel investments. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Ms. Lancaster worked in the hospitality finance group at Wells Fargo Bank originating hospitality loans to leading real estate investment firms across the U.S.  Ms. Lancaster spent most of her career in Blackstone’s real estate asset management group, where she managed hotel investments ranging from individual full-service hotels to portfolio companies comprising 500+ hotels. Ms. Lancaster holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Villanova University.

name: Anamica Broetz
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Anamica Broetz is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, Ms. Broetz is responsible for developing and managing institutional and private wealth client relationships across India. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Ms. Broetz was global head of PE fundraising and investor relations at DWS Private Equity, where she successfully led the fundraising of several commingled funds across multiple strategies including secondaries, co-investments, fund of funds and private credit. She was also a voting member on the PE Investment Committee. Ms. Broetz holds a Masters in Finance degree from Delhi University and a Bachelor of Arts (Honors) degree from Shri Ram College of Commerce of Delhi University.

name: Ananya Tripathi
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Ananya Tripathi is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she focuses on driving business plans and operations across the real estate portfolio in India. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Ms. Tripathi held various leadership roles, including CEO of WhiteHat Jr. and director at KKR Capstone India, where she assisted portfolio companies with strategy and operations. Ms. Tripathi holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Indian Institute of Management, Kozhikode.

name: André Flores
title: Managing Partner | Energy
bio: André Flores is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Energy Group, responsible for leading business development and transaction execution for investments in Brazil. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Flores was head of the commercial department at Votorantim Energia and an associate partner at McKinsey. Mr. Flores received a Master of Business Administration degree from the Fundação Getúlio Vargas and Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro and a bachelor’s degree from the Pontifícia Universidade Católica of Rio de Janeiro.

name: Andrea Rocheleau
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Andrea Rocheleau is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group where she leads the legal execution of global investment opportunities. Ms. Rocheleau has held various legal roles at Brookfield, including most recently as general counsel of TerraForm Power. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2003, Ms. Rocheleau was an associate at the law firm of Freshfields Bruckhaus Deringer in London. Ms. Rocheleau holds a law degree from Queen’s University and a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McGill University.

name: Andrew Alexander
title: Managing Director | Public Securities
bio: Andrew Alexander is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Public Securities Group. In this role, he has oversight and portfolio management of the infrastructure equities strategies and contributes to the portfolio construction process, including execution of buy and sell decisions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2008, Mr. Alexander held an analyst position at SNL Financial. Mr. Alexander holds a Master's degree from SDA Bocconi School of Management and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Virginia.

name: Andrew Burych
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Andrew Burych is a Managing Partner and Head of East Asia for Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for investment and portfolio management in the region, including Greater China, South Korea, Japan and South East Asia. He has held several positions across the organization including roles with the North American and European real estate teams. Prior to joining Brookfield 2010, Mr. Burych worked at M3 Capital Partners in the U.K. Mr. Burych holds a Master of Science degree from the London School of Economics and Political Science and a Bachelor of Applied Science degree from the University of Toronto. Featured Content Podcast | 15:51 Andrew Burych, Michael Cocozzo JUN 2026 Deal Debrief: Cheongna Logistics Center

name: Andrew Ehrlickman
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Andrew Ehrlickman is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Credit Group. In this role, Mr. Ehrlickman focuses on business development and transaction execution across Brookfield’s infrastructure credit strategies in North America. Before joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Ehrlickman advised on M&A in the renewable energy sector at a leading international investment bank. Mr. Ehrlickman holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Penn State University.

name: Andy Smith
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Andy Smith is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads North American investments for logistics, playing a key role in the growth of the sector globally including its expansion into new markets. He previously worked for Brookfield's Private Equity Group, focusing on the Special Investments strategy. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Smith worked in the M&A group at a global real estate investment bank. Mr. Smith holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Texas.

name: Angela Mitchell
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Angela Mitchell is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Mitchell focuses on enhancing the organizational effectiveness of portfolio companies and advancing value creation priorities across the platform. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Ms. Mitchell was a Partner in the advisory practice at KPMG concentrating on real assets sectors including mining, real estate, telecommunications and transportation. She was previously a vice president of risk and internal audit at a mining and chemicals company. Ms. Mitchell holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University and is both a Chartered Professional Accountant and Certified Internal Auditor.

name: Anish Jain
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Anish Jain is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. He is a member of its business operations team and is responsible for supporting execution and transformation within portfolio companies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Jain was CEO of TSS, a Texas oilfield-services supply chain and logistics company, and served as an operations advisor to Blackstone, Carlyle, Apollo, and Energy Capital Partners on various energy and infrastructure transactions. He has also held roles in industrial businesses running finance, strategic planning, corporate development, international operations, and investor relations functions. Mr. Jain began his career in investment banking with UBS in New York City, and then private equity with Temasek Holdings in Singapore. Mr. Jain holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania and Master of Science and Bachelor of Science degrees from Tufts University.

name: Ankur Gupta
title: Deputy Chief Investment Officer | Head of Asia Pacific and Middle East, Real Estate
bio: Ankur Gupta is Deputy Chief Investment Officer of Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, assisting in global investment decisions. Mr. Gupta is also the Head of Asia Pacific and Middle East for the Real Estate Group and is responsible for overseeing real estate activities in these regions, including investments, portfolio management and new fund formation. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Mr. Gupta worked for a leading real estate development firm. Mr. Gupta holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Columbia Business School and a Bachelor of Technology degree from the Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay.

name: Anthony Bavaro
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Anthony Bavaro is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, he is responsible for all aspects of trade execution and settlement, operational fund management, asset valuation and servicing and risk reporting and tracking. Additionally, he works across Brookfield’s businesses assisting with execution of special situations. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Mr. Bavaro was Chief Financial Officer and Partner at Sandell Asset Management, responsible for financial reporting, operations and back office administration. Mr. Bavaro holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Wagner College and is a New York State licensed Certified Public Accountant.

name: Anthony Gardner
title: Senior Advisor | Brookfield Asset Management
bio: Anthony Gardner is a Senior Advisor to Brookfield in Europe. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Gardner served on the board of Brookfield Business Partners. He previously served as U.S. Ambassador to the European Union, spent several years on the leadership team of Palamon Capital Partners, and in the leveraged finance and M&A groups of Bank of America and GE Capital, respectively. He has also worked at international law firms in London, Paris, New York and Brussels. Mr. Gardner holds a Master of Finance degree from London Business School, a Juris Doctor degree from Columbia Law School, a Master of Philosophy degree from Oxford University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Harvard University. He is also a member of the board of Iberdrola S.A.

name: Anuj Ranjan
title: CEO | Private Equity
bio: Anuj Ranjan is Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield’s Private Equity Group and Brookfield Business Corporation. In this role, Mr. Ranjan is responsible for the investments, operations and expansion of the Private Equity business, in addition to managing Brookfield’s external strategic partnerships. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Ranjan joined Brookfield in 2006 and has held various positions within the company and its affiliates. He established and previously led Brookfield’s India and Middle East operations. Mr. Ranjan holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Ivey Business School at Western University and a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Alberta. name: Arpit Agrawal
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Arpit Agrawal is a Managing Partner and Head of India and the Middle East for Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Agrawal is responsible for all infrastructure investment and portfolio management activity in the region. Prior to joining Brookfield’s in 2016, Mr. Agrawal was a vice president for an infrastructure asset manager. Mr. Agrawal holds a Master of Business Administration from the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore and a Bachelor’s degree from the National Institute of Technology Allahabad.

name: Arturo Pelaez
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Arturo Pelaez is a Managing Director in Brookfield Wealth Solutions, responsible for Portfolio Management and Strategy. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Pelaez served as Vice President, Corporate Development at Voya Financial. Previously, Mr. Pelaez was an investment banker with Citigroup where he focused on Insurance M&A across the U.S., Latin America and Europe. Mr. Pelaez holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Mechanical Engineering from Columbia University and a Master’s degree in Finance from London Business School.

name: Ashank Kothari
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Ashank Kothari is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for new investments, strategy and asset management initiatives across various real estate asset classes in India. Mr. Kothari joined Brookfield in 2017 and has led a wide range of investments across strategies at the platform, portfolio and property level. Prior to Brookfield, Mr. Kothari worked for a global private equity firm in New York. Mr. Kothari holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Virginia, McIntire School of Commerce.

name: Barry Blattman
title: Vice Chair | Brookfield Asset Management
bio: Barry Blattman is a Vice Chair of Brookfield Asset Management. In this role, he focuses on senior, strategic client and business relationships, and contributes to general business development and transaction strategy globally. He also serves on the board of directors for Brookfield Asset Management and Brookfield Wealth Solutions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2002, Mr. Blattman was a Managing Director at Merrill Lynch, having begun his career with Salomon Brothers in 1986. Mr. Blattman holds a Master of Business Administration degree from New York University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Michigan. He serves on the board of Montefiore Health System and chairs its Real Estate Planning and Development Committee.

name: Becky Lumlock
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Becky Lumlock is an Operating Partner in Brookfield's Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Lumlock is responsible for working with European portfolio companies to support their growth and to mitigate risk. Ms. Lumlock also provides global oversight of health, safety, security and environment programs for our portfolio companies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Ms. Lumlock was an executive at a U.K. rail network operator. Previously, she worked internationally on four continents for two global oil companies in a wide range of senior leadership positions including Country Deputy President and COO. Ms. Lumlock holds a combined Honours Bachelor of Arts degree in economics and sociology from the University of York. Featured Content Podcast | 20:50 Becky Lumlock, Gabriele Montesi, Vincent Kerboull JUL 2024 What Does It Take to Bring the Olympic Games to Life?

name: Ben Annable
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Ben Annable is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for the negotiation and legal aspects of the real estate group's European mergers and acquisitions activities, including deal structuring and execution. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Annable was a partner at a leading U.K. law firm, where he focused on M&A and joint ventures. Mr. Annable holds a Graduate Diploma in Law from The University of Law and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Durham University.

name: Ben Brown
title: Co-President and Head of the Americas | Real Estate
bio: Ben Brown is Co-President of Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and Head of the Americas region. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing real estate activities globally with responsibility for investments and portfolio management in the Americas region. Mr. Brown has held various leadership roles at the firm in both New York and London. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Brown worked at the New Boston Fund. Mr. Brown holds a Bachelor of Science Degree from Northeastern University and is a member of the Real Estate Board of New York’s Executive Committee and Board of Governors. Featured Content Podcast | 29:15 Lowell Baron, Brad Hyler, Ben Brown AUG 2025 "Waiting is Not a Strategy": A 2025 Real Estate Update Podcast | 27:26 Ben Brown, Kelly Goddard JUL 2023 Special Episode: 2022 Sustainability Report

name: Ben Vaughan
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Ben Vaughan is an Operating Partner and Chief Operating Officer of Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group and is responsible for overseeing all global asset management initiatives. Since joining Brookfield in 2001, Mr. Vaughan has held several leadership roles across the Infrastructure Group and broader Brookfield Asset Management. Mr. Vaughan holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen’s University.

name: Benjamin Farrow
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Benjamin Farrow is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Private Equity Group.  In this role, he has key leadership responsibilities in Brookfield's Special Investments strategy, including structuring, negotiating and executing transactions for the strategy globally.  Mr. Farrow has also led several corporate business development initiatives for Brookfield Asset Management. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Farrow worked in the private equity and restructuring groups at a global law firm. Mr. Farrow holds a Juris Doctor degree from Osgoode Hall Law School and a Bachelor of Aerospace Engineering degree from Carleton University.

name: Bernardo Taier
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Bernardo Sequeira Taier is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads the legal investments and risk function in Brazil. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Taier worked at a boutique law firm, and PwC’s consulting division and legal arm. Mr. Taier holds a Law degree from PUCRio and an LL.M. degree from Instituto de Empresa Business School in Madrid, with extension in the National University of Singapore.

name: Billy Hopkins
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Billy Hopkins is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Credit Group. In this role, he focuses on the origination, underwriting and asset management of the group’s real estate debt strategies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Hopkins worked at J.P. Morgan Asset Management as an executive director, where he oversaw originations for the west coast and northeast markets. Previously, Mr. Hopkins held various roles at Monday Properties and CBRE Capital Markets. Mr. Hopkins holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Mississippi.

name: Brad Hyler
title: Co-President and Head of Europe | Real Estate
bio: Brad Hyler is Co-President of Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and Head of Real Estate in Europe. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing real estate activities globally with responsibility for investments, strategy and portfolio management in Europe. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2011, Mr. Hyler held various positions at O’Connor Capital Partners and Jones Lang Lasalle. Mr. Hyler holds an Economics degree from the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill. He serves as a Director on several of Brookfield’s real estate portfolio company boards in Europe. Featured Content Podcast | 29:15 Lowell Baron, Brad Hyler, Ben Brown AUG 2025 "Waiting is Not a Strategy": A 2025 Real Estate Update

name: Bradley Weismiller
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Bradley Weismiller is a Managing Partner at Brookfield and Head of Capital Markets for Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for the strategy and execution of asset-level and corporate financings across Brookfield’s global real estate strategies. Mr. Weismiller joined Brookfield in 2004. Prior to his current role, Mr. Weismiller was Chief Financial Officer for Brookfield Asset Management in Europe and responsible for strategy and execution of all European financings. Additionally, Mr. Weismiller helped oversee Brookfield’s foreign exchange and interest rate risk management, including active management of hedging strategies. Mr. Weismiller holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the Mason School of Business at the College of William and Mary in Virginia.

name: Brett Fox
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Brett Fox is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, focusing on the execution of the group’s legal, governance and regulatory strategies. He has held several senior roles across the organization focused on legal, corporate and administrative matters. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2002, Mr. Fox was an Associate at the law firm Cahill Gordon & Reindel. Mr. Fox earned a Juris Doctor degree from Fordham University School of Law and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Cornell University.

name: Brian Baker
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Brian Baker is an Operating Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Baker works primarily with our midstream operating companies to set strategic direction, manage risk and support growth initiatives to create long-term value. Since joining Brookfield in 2007, Mr. Baker has held several senior roles across the Infrastructure Group. Mr. Baker holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Calgary and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Brian Cook
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Brian Cook is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group, responsible for portfolio management. In this capacity, Mr. Cook plays leadership roles across risk, HSSE, and integration of new assets. He was previously Chief Financial Officer in Brookfield’s energy marketing group and Senior Vice President, Finance, for Brookfield Renewable Partners. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2008, Mr. Cook held senior finance and investment positions at a major Canadian mutual fund company. Mr. Cook holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Guelph, the Chartered Financial Analyst designation and is a member of the Chartered Professional Accountants of Canada. He is also on the investment committee for the Terry Fox Foundation and The Ottawa Hospital Foundation.

name: Brian Hurley
title: Managing Partner | Private Wealth
bio: Brian Hurley is a Managing Partner and General Counsel for Brookfield's Private Wealth Group, where he oversees the legal and compliance functions and product development. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Hurley was an attorney at Paul, Hastings LLP and a member of the investment management practice group, where he focused his practice on representing investment advisers and various investment companies. Mr. Hurley earned a Juris Doctor degree from Columbia University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the College of the Holy Cross.

name: Brian Hurowitz
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Brian Hurowitz is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for the group’s tax operations globally, focusing on tax compliance, cash management, tax reporting, internal reorganizations and special projects. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Mr. Hurowitz was the head of tax at a global media company. He also spent a decade at EY, in their financial services office where he was assisted his clients with mergers & acquisitions, restructurings and tax provisions. Mr. Hurowitz holds a Master in Tax from New York University School of Law, a Juris Doctor degree from Duke University School of Law and a Bachelor of Science degree from Cornell University.

name: Brian Kingston
title: Executive Chair | Real Estate
bio: Brian Kingston is Executive Chair of Brookfield's Real Estate business. In this role, he is responsible for providing strategic oversight of Brookfield’s real estate investments and operations as well as supporting the overall growth of the business. In addition, he is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Kingston joined Brookfield in 2001 and has held a number of senior roles across the organization, most recently as CEO of the Real Estate business. Mr. Kingston holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen's University. Featured Content News PERE Credit JUN 2024 Brookfield’s Kingston: The Future is Debt Podcast | 23:03 Lowell Baron, Brian Kingston JAN 2024 Special Episode: 2024 Real Estate Investing Outlook News Bloomberg AUG 2023 Why Brookfield's Kingston is Bullish on San Francisco, LA News Bloomberg TV AUG 2023 Brian Kingston on Bloomberg TV

name: Brian Lawson
title: Vice Chair | Brookfield Corporation
bio: Brian Lawson is a Vice Chair of Brookfield Corporation. In this role, he provides guidance and advice on the company’s finance and risk management activities. Since joining Brookfield in 1988, Mr. Lawson has held a number of senior management positions in Brookfield’s investment and finance operations, including serving as CFO of Brookfield Asset Management from 2002 to 2020. In 2013, he was named Canada’s CFO of the Year by PwC, FEI Canada and Robert Half International. Mr. Lawson is Chair of the board of directors of the Community Food Centres Canada. He and his wife support a number of initiatives focused on transforming the food system for better human and planetary health.

name: Bruce Flatt
title: CEO, Brookfield Corporation
bio: Bruce Flatt is the Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield Corporation, a global investment firm focused on alternative asset management, wealth solutions, and its operating businesses, with over $1 trillion in assets under management. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Flatt joined Brookfield in 1990 and became CEO in 2002. Under his leadership, Brookfield has developed a global operating presence in more than 30 countries. Mr. Flatt also serves as Chair of the Board of Directors of Brookfield Asset Management and has served on many public company boards over the past three decades.

name: Bruno Lima
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Bruno Lima is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, he works with Brazilian portfolio companies to support their growth and mitigate risk. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Lima held successive roles at a leading Spanish investment bank. Mr. Lima holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Fundação Getulio Vargas.

name: Bryan Davis
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Bryan Davis is a Managing Partner and Chief Financial Officer in Brookfield's Real Estate Group. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Brookfield Property Partners, the Firm’s former flagship public real estate vehicle, Brookfield’s global office property company, and Trilon Financial Corp., Brookfield's financial services subsidiary. Prior to joining Brookfield in 1999, he worked in restructuring and advisory services at Deloitte. Mr. Davis holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen's University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Bryan Gallagher
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Bryan Gallagher is a Managing Director and Head of Legal for Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, he manages and oversees legal aspects of the credit business, which includes providing legal oversight to Brookfield's credit investment strategies and capital solutions business, and working closely with Brookfield's partner managers and banking partners in the credit space to support and grow those relationships. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Gallagher was senior vice president and legal counsel at iCapital Network, overseeing legal affairs, fund offerings and new product initiatives. Prior to iCapital, he was vice president and assistant general counsel at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, where he focused on alternative investments, as well as capital raising and regulatory matters. He began his career as a corporate attorney at two global law firms. Mr. Gallagher graduated with a Juris Doctor degree from the University of Hofstra School of Law and a Bachelor of Arts degree from The College of the Holy Cross.

name: Bryan Smith
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Bryan Smith is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, responsible for accounting, reporting and operations of Brookfield’s real estate private funds. Prior to joining Brookfield in March 2018, Mr. Smith was the CFO of U.S. real estate at The Carlyle Group. Mr. Smith also held positions at Ernst & Young’s assurance practice, FINRA and CapitalSource. Mr. Smith holds dual Bachelor of Science degrees from Virginia Tech.

name: Cam Ha
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Cam Ha is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Corporate Group. In this role, he manages all tax related matters for the group, including tax planning, global transfer pricing and tax compliance. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Ha held positions in the tax departments of a global semiconductor company and a professional services firm. Mr. Ha holds a Bachelor of Arts degree and Master of Accounting degree from the University of Waterloo. He is a member of the Chartered Professional Accountants of Ontario.

name: Carl Ching
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Carl Ching is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Ching responsible for transaction structuring in Canada and South America as well as related operational and tax oversight matters. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Mr. Ching worked in the transaction tax group for a leading accounting firm where he advised strategic and private equities on acquisitions, dispositions and international organizations. Mr. Ching holds a Bachelor of Business Administration from York University.  He is a Chartered Professional Accountant and a Certified Public Accountant.

name: Carlos Castro
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Carlos Castro is an Operating Partner in Latin America as well as Country Head in Colombia for Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. He is responsible for asset management activities in Colombia. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Mr. Castro held corporate finance roles in the financial and industrial sectors in Colombia, Washington, D.C., and São Paulo. He also worked in investment banking in Colombia and as the Chief Financial Officer of two Colombian companies. Mr. Castro holds a Master of Science degree from the London Business School and a Bachelor’s degree from Universidad de Los Andes in Bogotá.

name: Carlos Floresguerra
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Carlos Floresguerra is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, he is responsible for developing and managing key global customer accounts for the business, supporting the negotiation of contracts and energy frameworks. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Floresguerra held several senior leadership roles in companies in the energy sector, including GE Solar and Safari Energy, where he led the strategy, financial structuring and execution of solar development projects. Mr. Floresguerra holds a Bachelor of Science degree from New York University.

name: Carmela Di Meo
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Carmela Di Meo is a Managing Director and Head of Marketing for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, she is responsible for the group’s global strategic marketing initiatives. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Ms. Di Meo worked at PineBridge Investments as Chief Marketing Officer, where she oversaw the firm’s marketing, communications and product initiatives. Previously, Ms. Di Meo held a number of marketing leadership roles at AllianceBernstein, OppenheimerFunds, and Brown Brothers Harriman. Ms. Di Meo holds a Master of Business Administration degree from New York University Stern School of Business and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Long Island University.

name: Caroline Rouse
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Caroline Rouse is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, she focuses on business development and transaction execution across Brookfield’s infrastructure strategies in Europe. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Ms. Rouse worked at leading investment banks, providing financing solutions for infrastructure projects throughout the Americas. Ms. Rouse holds a Master's degree from the University of Cambridge and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Yale University. Featured Content Podcast | 16:51 Natalie Hadad, Caroline Rouse MAY 2026 Deal Debrief: Duke Energy Florida

name: Carolyn Bidwell
title: Managing Partner | Credit
bio: Carolyn Bidwell is Head of Tax for Brookfield's Credit Group as well as Head of U.S. Tax for Brookfield Asset Management. In this role, she leads the Credit Group’s global tax function, including tax planning and strategy, structuring, risk management, tax authority audits and compliance, and tax-related legislative and regulatory initiatives. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Ms. Bidwell was an associate at the law firms of Skadden, Arps, Slate, Meagher & Flom and Clifford Chance, where she represented private equity funds and public and private companies in M&A, dispositions, joint ventures, restructurings, and fund structuring. Ms. Bidwell holds a Juris Doctor degree from Columbia University School of Law and a Bachelor of Laws degree from University College London. Ms. Bidwell serves as a committee member of the Real Estate Roundtable, the Institute for Portfolio Alternatives and several other industry groups. She also serves on the Board of Directors of the United Way of New York City.

name: Casey Tushaus
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Casey Tushaus is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Wealth Group. In this role, he leads the fund accounting and administration team. He also serves as Treasurer for Brookfield’s U.S. registered fund complex. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Mr. Tushaus held finance roles at Walton Street Capital. Mr. Tushaus holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Illinois Wesleyan University and is a Certified Public Accountant.

name: Charles Slicklen
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Charles “C.J.” Slicklen is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads investment management for student and manufactured housing across North America. Since joining the firm in 2018, he has held leadership roles in New York and London, including serving as CEO of Livensa Living, Brookfield's former student housing platform in Iberia. Prior to Brookfield, Mr. Slicklen held management positions at Related Companies and Brookdale Senior Living, focusing on multi-family and senior housing. Mr. Slicklen holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the School of Hotel Administration at Cornell University.

name: Chloe Berry
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Chloe Berry is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Berry is the Head of the Brookfield Infrastructure Income Strategy and is also responsible for the group’s global capital markets and treasury function. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Berry worked in corporate finance and M&A at large multinational corporations and a global investment bank. Ms. Berry holds a Bachelor of Science degree from McGill University.

name: Chris Harris
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Chris Harris is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group, responsible for client relations in the Western United States. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Harris was a director with Macquarie and before that, Citi. In 2005, he was appointed a Trustee to the Arizona State Retirement System. During his seven years on the $30 billion plan, his service included roles as Vice Chairman of the Investment Committee and the Trustee Representative on the private markets, real estate and private equity sub-committees. During his tenure, he helped spearhead a new investment policy statement, streamlined governance policies with regards to manager selection and was involved in two tactical asset allocation surveys and implementations. Mr. Harris holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Finance and Entrepreneurship from the University of Arizona. He currently serves on the National Board of Advisors at the University of Arizona Eller Business School and on a number of other non-profit committees and boards.

name: Chris Sprangers
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Chris Sprangers is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he leads client distribution, capital raising and investor relations for Brookfield in Australia and New Zealand. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Sprangers held various roles at Macquarie Group, including vice president investor solutions group, and fund manager of its opportunistic real estate fund platform. He began his career as an undergraduate cadet at KPMG. Mr. Sprangers holds a Bachelor of Business degree from the University of Technology Sydney and is a member of the Chartered Accountants Australia. Mr. Sprangers also serves on the National Council of the Property Council of Australia’s Capital Markets Committee.

name: Christina Kim
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Christina Kim is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, she is responsible for the origination, execution and management of global infrastructure direct high grade and crossover credit investments. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Ms. Kim led a team at Prudential Private Capital, where she was responsible for originating, structuring, executing and managing global infrastructure debt investments. Ms. Kim previously held roles at Goldman Sachs and Citigroup within the investment banking divisions. Ms. Kim holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of California, Berkeley.

name: Christine Dehil
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Christine Dehil is a Managing Director and Head of Marketing for Brookfield's Private Wealth Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Ms. Dehil was head of Americas marketing at AllianceBernstein where she was responsible for driving the overall marketing strategy for the institutional and intermediary distribution channels. Previously, she served as head of product communications for Legg Mason and its predecessor, Citigroup Asset Management. Ms. Dehil holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Weatherhead School of Management at Case Western Reserve University and a Bachelor of Science degree from Ohio University.

name: Christopher Donahue
title: Managing Partner | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Christopher Donahue is a Managing Partner in Brookfield Wealth Solutions. In this role, he focuses on investments in the property and casualty sector. He is also Chief Executive Officer of Argo, Brookfield’s Specialty Property and Casualty business. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Donahue held roles at Lazard and Morgan Stanley focused on advising financial institutions. Mr. Donahue holds a Master of Arts degree from the University of St. Andrews and a Master of Business Administration from the University of Virginia Darden School of Business.

name: Christopher Reilly
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Christopher Reilly is a Managing Partner and the Head of Brookfield’s Real Estate Solutions Group. Prior to his current role, Mr. Reilly co-led Brookfield’s real estate finance business activities where he was responsible for the origination, underwriting, and asset management of transactions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, he was a Managing Director at Natixis Real Estate Capital Markets, ran the Large Loan Group at UBS and was an Executive Director at Morgan Stanley, focused on the origination and distribution of commercial real estate loans. He was also a Credit Analyst at Fitch Ratings. Mr. Reilly holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the Stern School of Business at New York University. Featured Content Commentary Christopher Reilly, Fabian Neuenschwander, Alison Giampa, Marcus Day APR 2025 Providing liquidity and enhancing value: The case for GP-led capital solutions

name: Colin Oberg
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Colin Oberg is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he serves as the global fundraise management head for real estate, responsible for all fundraising business plans for the asset class. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Mr. Oberg held progressively senior roles in real estate acquisitions, product management and investor relations at Invesco. Mr. Oberg holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Colgate University.

name: Connor Moen
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Connor Moen is a Managing Director in Brookfield Wealth Solutions. In this role, he leads the investment strategy team and oversees portfolio strategy and investment performance across the platform, as well as the development of investment processes, best practices, innovation and technology. Mr. Moen joined Brookfield within the Infrastructure Group and has held several roles across the organization. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Moen worked at a leading professional services firm. Mr. Moen holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen’s University. He is also a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Connor Teskey
title: CEO, Brookfield Asset Management | CEO, Energy
bio: Connor Teskey is CEO of Brookfield Asset Management, a leading global alternative asset manager, headquartered in New York, with over $1 trillion of assets under management across infrastructure, renewable power and transition, private equity, real estate and credit. He is also the head of Brookfield’s Energy group, responsible for investments and operations across a range of energy infrastructure investments. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Teskey joined Brookfield in 2012 and has held a variety of investment and management roles. Prior to Brookfield, he worked in corporate debt origination at a Canadian bank. Mr. Teskey holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Western Ontario. Featured Content News CNBC MAY 2026 Connor Teskey on CNBC Squawk Box Asia Podcast | 1:24:28 Connor Teskey MAR 2026 Bonus: BAM CEO Connor Teskey on "The Knowledge Project" News Bloomberg MAR 2026 Brookfield’s Connor Teskey live at Bloomberg Invest Commentary Connor Teskey DEC 2025 Energy outlook: Scaling power to meet relentless demand Podcast | 10:20 Connor Teskey, Hadley Peer Marshall SEP 2025 Takeaways from Investor Day 2025: Brookfield Asset Management News Bloomberg TV SEP 2025 Connor Teskey with Bloomberg at Brookfield's 2025 Investor Day News FCLT Global APR 2025 Connor Teskey on Digitalization, Decarbonization, Deglobalization News CNBC JUL 2024 Connor Teskey on CNBC’s Squawk on the Street News Bloomberg JUL 2024 Brookfield Lines Up a 36-Year-Old Rising Star as Next CEO News The Globe & Mail DEC 2023 Corporate Citizen of the Year: Brookfield’s Connor Teskey Podcast | 27:36 Connor Teskey FEB 2023 Setting the Scene: The Mission

name: Courtney Burke
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Courtney Burke is a Managing Director and Head of Finance for Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, she is responsible for the finance function of the Credit business and strategic priorities with our affiliated partner managers. Prior to re-joining Brookfield in 2023, Ms. Burke held several roles in corporate and investment finance at OMERS. Previously, Ms. Burke held progressively senior finance roles at Brookfield and PwC. Ms. Burke holds an Honours Business Administration degree from the University of Western Ontario Ivey Business School and a Bachelor of Science degree from Queen’s University.

name: Courtney Kaita
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Courtney Kaita is a Managing Director of Brookfield Wealth Solutions. She is also Co-Chief Investment Officer of Brookfield Wealth Solutions’ U.S. life and annuity businesses. In this role, she is responsible for overseeing structured investments within the portfolio. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Ms. Kaita was at Global Atlantic Financial Group, where she was a vice president on its asset origination team. Ms. Kaita previously held various structuring and syndication roles at Morgan Stanley within the securitized products group. Ms. Kaita holds Bachelor of Science and Bachelor of Music degrees from the University of Michigan.

name: Craig Laurie
title: Managing Partner | Credit
bio: Craig Laurie is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Credit Group and co-Head of its capital solutions business. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing the group’s capital markets activities. Mr. Laurie has held a number of senior finance positions across the Firm, including focusing on capital markets for Brookfield’s Private Equity Group and as Chief Financial Officer of Brookfield Business Partners. Prior to joining Brookfield in 1997, Mr. Laurie worked in restructuring and advisory services at Deloitte. Mr. Laurie holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen’s University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Craig Noble
title: CEO | Credit
bio: Craig Noble is Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield’s Credit business. In this role, he is responsible for investments, operations, and the expansion of the Credit business which encompasses Brookfield’s credit strategies and partnerships with affiliated managers. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Since joining Brookfield in 2004, Mr. Noble has held a variety of senior roles across private and public markets, including most recently CEO of Alternative Investments. Mr. Noble previously held investment roles in credit and infrastructure and was the CIO and CEO of Brookfield's public securities business. Prior to Brookfield, Mr. Noble spent five years with Bank of Montreal focused on corporate lending and corporate finance. Mr. Noble holds a Master of Business Administration degree from York University, a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Mount Allison University and is a CFA charterholder. Featured Content Commentary Craig Noble DEC 2025 Credit outlook: Discipline is an all-weather strategy Podcast | 19:40 Hadley Peer Marshall, Craig Noble JUN 2025 Growth and Opportunity in Private Credit News Private Debt Investor JUN 2025 Brookfield adds latest partnership News The Wall Street Journal FEB 2025 Brookfield credit chief bullish on future growth of asset-based lending

name: Craig Ruckman
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Craig Ruckman is a Managing Director and Head of the Registered Funds Legal and Regulatory team for Brookfield's Private Wealth Group, responsible for legal, regulatory and compliance matters involving pooled vehicles registered under various global regulatory regimes. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Ruckman was Associate General Counsel and Head of the US Registered Funds and Regulatory Legal team at Allianz Global Investors U.S. LLC.  He has additional experience in private practice as part of the investment management practice group at K&L Gates LLP and as Counsel in the division of investment management at the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Mr. Ruckman holds a law degree from Washington University in St. Louis School of Law and a Bachelor of Arts from Vanderbilt University.

name: Craig Wright
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Craig Wright is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he focuses on industrials investments across control and non-control strategies in North America, with responsibility for origination, underwriting, execution and portfolio oversight. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, he held roles in investment banking and private equity. Mr. Wright holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Cornell University. Featured Content Podcast | 19:53 Matt Homan, Craig Wright APR 2026 Deal Debrief: Fosber Case Study David Hall, Craig Wright FEB 2026 Transforming a corporate orphan into a carveout champ

name: Cristiano Machado
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Cristiano Machado is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, responsible for finance and operations of Brookfield’s real estate private funds. Mr. Machado joined Brookfield in 1995 and has held several senior positions, including Chief Financial Officer for Brookfield-affiliated companies in the retail, hotel and development sectors. He also has been involved in a wide range of investment, financing and capital market activities. Mr. Machado holds Master of Business Administration and Bachelor of Science degrees from the Federal University of Rio de Janeiro. He also completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School.

name: Cyrus Madon
title: Executive Vice Chair, Brookfield Asset Management | Executive Chair, Private Equity
bio: Cyrus Madon is Executive Vice Chair of Brookfield Asset Management. He also serves as the Executive Chair of Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is responsible for developing strategy and providing investment oversight, while supporting the broader team in executing our growth initiatives. Additionally, he is a member of Brookfield's Executive Committee. Mr. Madon joined Brookfield in 1998 and has held a number of senior roles across the organization, including CEO of Brookfield's Private Equity business. Mr. Madon holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Queen’s University. He is also on the board of the C.D. Howe Institute.

name: Damien Ng
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Damien Ng is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Corporate Group. In this role, he leads the capital markets and treasury function across Asia for our Infrastructure, Energy, Private Equity, Credit and Wealth Solutions Groups. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Ng worked in various corporate, syndicated and structured finance roles at financial institutions in Australia and Asia. Mr. Ng holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Technology Sydney and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Macquarie University.

name: Dana Petitto
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Dana Petitto is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. She currently serves as the Chief Operating Officer and Portfolio Manager of Brookfield REIT. Ms. Petitto has held a number of roles across the organization, most recently as the Chief Financial Officer for Brookfield REIT. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2005, Ms. Petitto was a manager in the corporate finance department of Bristol-Myers Squibb and in the audit group at KPMG. Ms. Petitto holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the A.B. Freeman School of Business at Tulane University.

name: Dani Brody
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Dani Brody is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for various legal and operational matters, including oversight of key governance frameworks and global enterprise risk management. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Ms. Brody worked at the law firm Allen & Overy LLP where she focused on cross-border mergers and acquisitions. Ms. Brody holds a Juris Doctor degree from Vanderbilt University Law School as well as Master of Arts and Bachelor of Arts degrees from Lehigh University.

name: Daniel Buehrens
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Daniel Buehrens is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Credit Group. In this role, he focuses on sourcing and investing across strategies, as well as financing the firm's real estate credit business. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Buehrens worked at Goldman Sachs as a vice president, where he focused on underwriting, structuring and distribution of commercial real estate loans. Mr. Buehrens holds a Bachelor of Arts degree in Economics from Hartwick College.

name: Daniel Cheng
title: Managing Partner | Energy
bio: Daniel Cheng is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, he is responsible for building and managing the energy business across Asia Pacific, as well as the Head of China for the group. Previously, Mr. Cheng was involved in Brookfield’s energy investment activities, primarily in North America. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Cheng worked in the mergers and acquisitions investment banking division of BMO Capital Markets. Mr. Cheng holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University and Bachelor of Mathematics degree from the University of Waterloo. Mr. Cheng is a board member of the Canadian Chamber of Commerce in Shanghai. Featured Content Podcast | 17:09 Daniel Cheng, Stefano Ghezzi JAN 2026 Deal Debrief: Catalytic Transition Fund

name: Daniel Parker
title: Managing Director | Public Securities
bio: Daniel Parker is a Managing Director and Portfolio Manager on the Global Credit team for Brookfield’s Public Securities Group. In this role, he oversees and contributes to the portfolio construction process, including execution of buy/sell decisions. He previously held a number of roles across the Public Securities Group. Prior to Brookfield in 2006, Mr. Parker was a credit analyst at Standard & Poor’s Rating Services. Mr. Parker started his career in international trade finance at Export Development Canada. Mr. Parker earned an Honors Bachelor of Commerce degree from Lakehead University. He is a CFA charterholder and a member of the CFA Society of Chicago.

name: Daniel Sorrell
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Daniel Sorrell is a Managing Director and Head of Diligence Management for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he manages the end-to-end fund due diligence process for Brookfield and its strategic partners across all of Brookfield’s strategies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Mr. Sorrell worked at Partners Group in the client solutions services unit, where he led a team responsible for the development and maintenance of all fund due diligence and marketing content.  Previously, he held various marketing roles at Anchin, Block & Anchin and ABI Marketing Public Relations. Mr. Sorrell holds a Master of Arts degree from New York University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from North Carolina State University.

name: Danielle Pagano
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Danielle Pagano is a Managing Director and Head of Business Management for Brookfield’s Private Wealth Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Ms. Pagano was the Chief Operating Officer for North America for Insight Investment. She has a track record of leadership in managing day-to-day business operations at various asset management firms and extensive expertise in non-U.S. distribution. Ms. Pagano holds Master of Arts degree from New York University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Gettysburg College.

name: Darryl Pinsker
title: Managing Partner | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Darryl Pinsker is a Managing Partner in Brookfield Wealth Solutions. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing legal strategy and transaction execution for its investment portfolios. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Pinsker held various legal roles at KKR & Co., Global Atlantic Financial Group and Morgan, Lewis & Bockius. Mr. Pinsker holds a Juris Doctor degree from the Benjamin N. Cardozo School of Law and a Bachelor of Science degree from Syracuse University.

name: Dave Gregory
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Dave Gregory is a Managing Partner and Chief Investment Officer of Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is responsible for reviewing the group’s investment opportunities globally, as well as investment origination, analysis and execution within the U.S. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Gregory worked in the mergers, acquisitions and restructuring group at Genuity Capital Markets. Mr. Gregory holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Western Ontario. Featured Content Podcast | 13:15 Dave Gregory, David Hall APR 2025 Deal Debrief: Chemelex

name: Dave Joynt
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Dave Joynt is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Joynt is primarily responsible for leading transportation-related investment activities and also serves as the Group’s Deputy Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Joynt was a senior principal at a leading Canadian pension investor on its infrastructure team in several geographies, including working as the CFO of its Australian rail business. Prior to that, Mr. Joynt worked in generalist private equity and advisory. Mr. Joynt holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Harvard Business School, where he graduated as a Baker Scholar, and an Honours Business Administration degree from the Richard Ivey School of Business, where he graduated as an Ivey Scholar. Featured Content Podcast | 27:37 Peter Stone, Dave Joynt JUN 2023 Deep Dive: The New Trade Routes

name: Dave Robison
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group

Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Robison was an executive director at J.P. Morgan where he worked closely with investment consultants across JPM’s private markets capabilities. Previously, Mr. Robison worked at Russell Investments where he advised consultants and plan sponsors on systematic investment strategies and at Deutsche Bank where he advised consultants on the implementation of rules-based equity strategies. Mr. Robison began his career at Thomson Reuters. Mr. Robison holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Gabelli School of Business at Fordham University and Bachelor of Arts degree from Hartwick College.

name: David Bonasia
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity

Mr. Bonasia has held various positions across the organization including investment origination and execution within the technology services sector, value creation and strategy as a member of the business operations team and investment analysis across deals in the industrial and business services sectors. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Bonasia held roles in private equity and investment banking, with a focus on M&A and complex restructurings. Mr. Bonasia holds a Bachelor of Engineering Science degree from Western University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the Richard Ivey School of Business. name: David Coates

He is a senior member of the Real Estate Credit team, where he focuses on the growth of the business, including structuring, capital markets activities and insurance-related initiatives. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Coates worked in private practice at Slaughter and May, where he specialized in leveraged finance, restructurings and insolvency, and structured finance. Mr. Coates holds a Graduate Diploma in Law from BPP Law School and a Bachelor of Natural Sciences degree from Durham University.

name: David Hall
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: David Hall is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is a member of the business operations team and focuses on control investments across North America, working closely with portfolio company management teams on value creation initiatives and operational improvement. He has also led portfolio company initiatives across Clarios, Antylia Scientific, Chemelex and Lightspeed. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Hall held senior operating and strategy roles at Honeywell. He previously served in strategy leadership roles at PPG Industries and McKinsey & Company. Mr. Hall holds a Master of Business Administration degree and a Master of Engineering Management degree from Northwestern University, and a Bachelor of Science degree from Cornell University. Featured Content Case Study David Hall, Craig Wright FEB 2026 Transforming a corporate orphan into a carveout champ

name: David Krant
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: David Krant is a Managing Partner and Chief Financial Officer of Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Krant has overall responsibility for the group’s finance, tax, treasury, and investor relations activities. Mr. Krant joined Brookfield in 2012 and has held several senior roles within the organization. Prior to joining Brookfield, Mr. Krant worked in the assurance and advisory group at one of the Big Four accounting firms. Mr. Krant is a graduate of the School of Business and Economics at Wilfrid Laurier University, and he is a member of the Canadian Institute of Chartered Accountants.

name: David Lanterman
title: Managing Director | Real Estate

In this role, he oversees asset management and capital projects across Brookfield’s North American Hospitality Portfolio. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Mr. Lanterman was with White Lodging, a developer, owner and operator of hospitality assets, where he held successive leadership roles, including Executive Vice President & Chief Operating Officer, and oversaw its hospitality portfolio. Mr. Lanterman holds a degree from Johnson & Wales University and serves on the brand advisory boards for Marriott and Hyatt.

name: David Levi
title: CEO | Global Client Group
bio: David Levi is a Managing Partner and Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he is responsible for Brookfield’s client relationships across the organization, including the expansion of fund offerings, client solutions and servicing its large and growing institutional and private wealth client base. Prior to this, Mr. Levi was Managing Partner and CEO of Brookfield Oaktree Wealth Solutions, which is responsible for Brookfield and Oaktree’s relationships with private wealth clients globally. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Mr. Levi was Head of global business development at Nuveen Investments, after holding similar positions at AllianceBernstein and Legg Mason. Mr. Levi holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Columbia Business School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Hamilton College. He is a Fellow of the 2019 class of the Aspen Finance Leaders Fellowship, a member of the Aspen Global Leadership Network and holds the Chartered Financial Analyst designation.

name: David Nazzicone
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
