Prior to joining Brookfield in 2013, Mr. Nazzicone was in the assurance and advisory group at one of the Big Four accounting firms. Mr. Nazzicone holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McMaster University, and is a member of the Canadian Institute of Chartered Accountants.

Mr. Schalleur holds a Master of Business Administration degree and a bachelor’s degree from La Salle University and completed executive leadership training at The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania.

name: David Todd

In this role, Mr. Todd is responsible for business development, investments and operations, and serves as the Portfolio Manager for the Brookfield single-family rental strategy. Previously, Mr. Todd focused on sourcing and executing investment opportunities for the real estate M&A team. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Todd held various real estate acquisition, development and asset management roles, following earlier experience as a management consultant and computer programmer. Mr. Todd holds a Master of Business Administration degree from University of Virginia and a Bachelor of Science degree from Virginia Tech.

Ms. Grant holds a Master of Business Administration from Stanford Graduate School of Business and a Bachelor of Commerce (Honors) from Queen's University.

name: Denis Turcotte

Prior to joining Brookfield, Mr. Turcotte held several roles, including Principal with North Channel Management and Capital Partners, CEO of Algoma Steel, and Paper Group President and EVP Corporate Development and Planning with Tembec. Mr. Turcotte holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Western Ontario and a Bachelor of Engineering degree from Lakehead University.

Mack Robinson College of Business and a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Georgia’s Terry College of Business. In 2019 she was recognized by Globe Street as the Investment Professional of the Year in the Inaugural Women of Influence awards and is an active member of various real estate organizations including NAIOP, ULI and Women Lead at Georgia State University. He also worked in the special situations division of Oaktree Capital Management and began his career at Deutsche Bank, working on leveraged finance and financial sponsor mergers and acquisitions. name: Fernando Ziziotti

name: Frank Yu

In this role, she oversees critical touchpoints and programs tailored for our institutional clients and continues to advise on the energy transition. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Ms. Miller was chief deputy of policy to the California Department of Finance and senior counselor on infrastructure and clean energy finance to the Governor, where she championed the state's landmark clean energy agenda. Prior to DWS, Mr. Sawkin was a senior associate at Grosvenor Capital Management, where his responsibilities included direct, co-investments and secondaries transactions across private equity and energy/infrastructure asset classes. Prior to joining GCM, he was an investment analyst within Credit Suisse’s private equity group. Mr. Sawkin holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from The College of Wooster.

name: Josh Feyissa
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Josh Feyissa is a Managing Director in Brookfield Wealth Solutions and Chief Operating Officer of Brookfield Wealth Solutions’ U.S. life and annuity businesses, including American National and American Equity, with whom he works closely on day-to-day operations. Previously, Mr. Feyissa worked on Brookfield’s special investments team, focused on investment origination and execution. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Feyissa was at Apollo Global Management, where he focused on distressed credit and special situations investing. Mr. Feyissa holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of British Columbia’s Sauder School of Business, where he was a Leslie Wong Fellow as a graduate of UBC’s Portfolio Management Foundation.

name: Josh Zinn
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Josh Zinn is a Managing Director and Chief Risk Officer of Brookfield Wealth Solutions. Previously, Mr. Zinn was responsible for financial market risk within Brookfield’s global capital markets and treasury function. Mr. Zinn joined Brookfield in 2010 as part of the acquisition of Babcock & Brown and previously worked as a portfolio manager at an Australian investment bank. Mr. Zinn holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of New South Wales.

name: Judah Siegal
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Judah Siegal is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for sourcing, executing, and managing technology-enabled investments. He has held several roles across the organization, including investment and strategic initiatives for Brookfield’s Growth team. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Mr. Siegal worked for Citigroup’s real estate investment banking division. Mr. Siegal holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania.

name: Julian Deschâtelets
title: Managing Partner | Energy
bio: Julian Deschâtelets is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Energy Group, responsible for the capital markets and treasury function globally. He previously held several roles in corporate and project finance. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2011, Mr. Deschâtelets worked as a project finance manager at Export Development Canada. Mr. Deschâtelets holds a Bachelor of Business Administration in Finance degree from L’École des Hautes Études Commerciales and has been a CFA charterholder since 2002.

name: Julian Seek
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Julian Seek is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads investment activities in the multifamily sector across North America. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Seek was an associate at the real estate lending platform Loancore Capital and an investment banking analyst at Goldman Sachs. Mr. Seek holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Columbia University.

name: Jun Park
title: Managing Partner | Head of Korea
bio: Jun Park is a Managing Partner and Head of South Korea and Japan in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Park is responsible for all infrastructure investment and portfolio management activity across the two countries and supports infrastructure investment activities in North Asia. Mr. Park is also Head of Brookfield Asset Management in South Korea, with responsibility for overseeing the Asset Manager’s business activities in the country. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Park was a managing director and founding member of Korea’s largest private equity firm. He began his career at a leading investment bank in New York. Mr. Park holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania. He also serves as a trustee on the board of Northfield Mount Hermon School in Massachusetts.

name: Justin Beber
title: Chief Operating Officer | Brookfield Corporation
bio: Justin Beber is Chief Operating Officer of Brookfield Corporation. In this role, he has primary oversight of Brookfield’s corporate operations, including corporate strategy, human resources, risk management, technology, legal, compliance, and internal audit activities. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Beber joined Brookfield in 2007 and has held a variety of senior roles including Head of Strategic Initiatives for Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. Prior to Brookfield, he was a partner with a leading Toronto-based law firm, where his practice focused on corporate finance, mergers & acquisitions, and private equity. Mr. Beber holds a combined Master of Business Administration and Bachelor of Laws (LL.B) degree from the Schulich School of Business and Osgoode Hall Law School at York University and a Bachelor of Economics degree from McGill University.

name: Justin Monge
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Justin Monge is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, he is responsible for investor relations, fundraising and finance activities for the group’s real estate debt strategies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2003, he was a director at Deutsche Bank where he was a member of the management team for realty mezzanine investment funds and served in various capacities within its real estate investment banking, real estate private equity and asset management operations groups. Mr. Monge holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Columbia University Graduate School of Business and an Artium Baccalaureus from Harvard College.

name: Karan Nayar
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Karan Nayar is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, he holds key leadership responsibilities across the group's real estate credit strategies, directing investment initiatives and overseeing origination, execution and management for Brookfield's insurance clients and accounts. He also serves as Portfolio Manager for Brookfield Wealth Solutions, focusing on real estate investments. Since joining Brookfield in 2008, Mr. Nayar has held several positions across the organization, including in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group where he focused on corporate and portfolio investments across asset classes, and in Brookfield’s Public Securities Group with a focus on structured credit. Mr. Nayar holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Chicago Booth School of Business, a Bachelor of Science degree from New York University Stern School of Business and the Chartered Financial Analyst designation.

name: Karen Khalil
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Oaktree Wealth Solutions
bio: Karen Khalil is a Managing Director and Head of Canada for Brookfield Oaktree Wealth Solutions. In this role, she is responsible for developing and maintaining relationships with wealth intermediaries across Canada. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Ms. Khalil was head of retail distribution for BlackRock's indexing business, iShares Canada, where she was responsible for shaping the firm's wealth management strategy. Previously, Ms. Khalil was head of institutional sales for Vanguard Investments Canada after having held similar roles with other firms, including UBS Global Asset Management Canada, HSBC Global Asset Management and Invesco. Ms. Khalil holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the LeBow College of Business at Drexel University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from McGill University.

name: Karly Lancaric
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Karly Lancaric is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, she is responsible for leading finance initiatives including financial reporting, treasury and corporate operations functions in Europe. Ms. Lancaric joined Brookfield in 2012 and has worked across the organization in progressively senior finance roles. Prior to Brookfield, Ms. Lancaric worked in the assurance and transaction advisory division of Ernst & Young. Ms. Lancaric holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Manitoba, is a Chartered Accountant and holds the Chartered Financial Analyst designation.

name: Kateryna Yason
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Kateryna Yason is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Yason leads the global portfolio management legal function and is the group’s Chief Risk Officer. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Ms. Yason was General Counsel and Corporate Secretary for a regulated trust company. Ms. Yason holds joint Master of Business Administration and Juris Doctor degrees from the Schulich School of Business and Osgoode Hall Law School at York University.

name: Kathleen Ryan
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Kathleen Ryan is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, she is responsible for developing and executing EMEA’s regional business, client and fundraising strategies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Ms. Ryan worked in investor relations at Graticule Asset Management. Previously, Ms. Ryan worked at Och Ziff Capital Management Group in their investor services group. Ms. Ryan holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Lehigh University.

name: Kathy Sarpash
title: Managing Director | Legal & Regulatory
bio: Kathy Sarpash is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Legal & Regulatory group. In this role, she is responsible for corporate legal, governance and regulatory functions for Brookfield’s asset management activities. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, she held a number of positions including General Counsel and Corporate Secretary at another asset management firm and Senior Legal Counsel in the Global Wealth and Distribution group of a Canadian Schedule I bank. Ms. Sarpash holds a Bachelor of Laws degree from the University of Sheffield School of Law in the U.K. and Bachelor of Arts (Honors) degree from the University of Toronto. Ms. Sarpash is called to the bar of Ontario.

name: Katie Anderson
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Katie Anderson is a Managing Director and Head of Compensation for Brookfield. In this role, she oversees global compensation programs, including the enhancement, implementation and administration of Brookfield's equity and carried interest plans. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Ms. Anderson was the head of compensation at SLC Asset Management, where she was responsible for all compensation and HR M&A activities. Previously, she held several compensation roles in Canada and the U.S. with Sun Life Financial, and was an executive compensation consultant with Willis Towers Watson. Ms. Anderson holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Waterloo.

name: Keir Hunt
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Keir Hunt is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Hunt is responsible for all legal aspects of infrastructure transactions in North America. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Hunt was an Assistant Vice President at a Canadian corporation, responsible for mergers and acquisitions, corporate finance and public company matters as the General Counsel of two listed companies. Mr. Hunt began his career at a leading Canadian law firm, where he focused on mergers and acquisitions, private equity, and corporate finance. Mr. Hunt holds a Bachelor of Laws degree from Queen’s University and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Thompson Rivers University.

name: Kelly Goddard
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Kelly Goddard is the Chief Sustainability Officer of Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, Ms. Goddard is responsible for the global sustainability strategy across renewable power and transition operations and Brookfield’s transition funds. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Ms. Goddard worked for BP in a number of development, operations and strategy roles including most recently as senior vice president of sustainability globally. Ms. Goddard holds a Master of Environmental Management degree with a concentration in environmental economics and policy from Duke University. Featured Content White Paper Gayle Miller, Kelly Goddard JUN 2026 From speed to scale: The next decade of power Podcast | 27:26 Ben Brown, Kelly Goddard JUL 2023 Special Episode: 2022 Sustainability Report

name: Kerrie McHugh
title: Managing Director | Corporate Communications & Brand
bio: Kerrie McHugh is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Corporate Communications & Brand group. In this role, she is responsible for media relations and communication for various businesses including Brookfield Wealth Solutions and Real Estate. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Ms. McHugh was the head of Americas communication at Deutsche Bank. Ms. McHugh holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Siena College.

name: Keshav Bhojania
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Keshav Bhojania is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group and Co-Head of the infrastructure structured solutions strategy, with responsibility for the business in EMEA. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Bhojania worked in the advisory group at a leading investment bank, where he was responsible for M&A and financings across the natural resources sector, including infrastructure. Mr. Bhojania earned a Post-Graduate Degree in Business Management from the Indian Institute of Ahmedabad and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Delhi.

name: Kevin English
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Kevin English is the Head of Business Management for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he oversees global technology and operations initiatives focused on building scale and efficiency within the platform. He is also responsible for enhancing management processes and transparency across teams and key stakeholders within Brookfield. Mr. English joined Brookfield in 2013 and previously served as the Chief Operating Officer of Brookfield’s Public Securities Group, where he oversaw the operating platform and several functional teams. Prior to Brookfield, he was a vice president at J.P. Morgan where he focused on operations and technology within the equities and prime brokerage businesses. Mr. English holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Columbia Business School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the College of the Holy Cross.

name: Kevin McCrain
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Kevin McCrain is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and Chief Executive Officer of retail at Brookfield Properties. Mr. McCrain joined Brookfield in 2010 and has been located in both the New York and London offices. Prior to taking over global portfolio management responsibility for the retail sector, he had been involved in several significant acquisitions and dispositions, including Center Parcs, Gazeley, IDI, Student Roost and Seoul IFC. He has also been on the board of several Brookfield portfolio companies, including Center Parcs, IFC Seoul and Student Roost. Mr. McCrain holds a Juris Doctor degree from Georgetown University Law Center and a bachelor’s degree from Sacred Heart University. He sits on the board of directors of various Brookfield retail portfolio companies.

name: Kevork Mesrobian
title: Managing Director | Real Estate

Mr. Mesrobian holds a Master of Science degree from New York University and a Bachelor of Science degree from Drexel University.

name: Krishna Iyer

Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Iyer worked for companies in the energy sector, including TerraForm Global and SunEdison, where he held roles in corporate development and in project finance. Mr. Iyer holds a Post Graduate Diploma in Management from the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad and a Bachelor’s Degree from the National Institute of Technology Trichy.

name: Kristen Haase
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Kristen Haase is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, she is responsible for transaction execution for North America and is actively involved in portfolio company management and strategic matters. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Ms. Haase worked in the mergers and acquisitions group at Davis Polk. Ms. Haase holds a Juris Doctor degree from University of Virginia School of Law and a Bachelor of Arts degree from The College of William and Mary.

name: Kristina Lam
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Kristina Lam is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for financial planning and analysis of Brookfield’s real estate private funds. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Ms. Lam worked for Blackstone, where she focused on real estate valuations, performance and investor reporting. Ms. Lam also held positions at Pricewaterhouse Coopers and Lehman Brothers. Ms. Lam holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Richmond and is a Certified Public Accountant.

name: Kumar Shah
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Kumar Shah is Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is responsible for investment origination, analysis and execution. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Shah was a managing director and founder of a growth-stage investment firm and built the investment programs for growth-stage enterprise and consumer technology investments at Transit Capital, Micromax and GEF Capital. Mr. Shah holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania and a Bachelor of Engineering degree from the University of Mumbai.

name: Kunal Dusad
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Kunal Dusad is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Capital Markets and Treasury group. In this role, he oversees currency and interest rate risk management across the firm, in addition to the capital markets activities of Brookfield Corporation. Mr. Dusad joined Brookfield in 2019 in London where he was responsible for capital markets for the European Private Equity group. Prior to joining Brookfield, Mr. Dusad held various roles at a bank, credit fund and startup. Mr. Dusad holds a Master of Arts in Economics from the University of Cambridge and is a Chartered Financial Analyst.

name: Laird MacDonald
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Laird MacDonald is a Managing Director and Global Head of Investor Relations for Brookfield's Private Wealth Group. In this role, he is responsible for the sales and client service for solutions offered in the wealth channel. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Mr. MacDonald worked at a big four accounting firm. Mr. MacDonald holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Lauren Okada Young
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Lauren Okada Young is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she focuses on investments and portfolio management in the hospitality and housing sectors across Europe. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Ms. Okada Young was an analyst in Bank of America Merrill Lynch’s real estate, gaming and lodging investment banking group, where she concentrated on M&A and corporate finance. Ms. Okada Young holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Colgate University. Featured Content Podcast | 15:52 Lauren Okada Young, Li Zhang NOV 2025 Deal Debrief: Generator Hostels

name: Lauren Young
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Lauren Young is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for investment activities and portfolio management across the office sector in North America. Ms. Young joined Brookfield in 2007 and has held a number of roles across the investing and operating sides of the global real estate business. Prior to joining Brookfield, she worked in real estate investment banking at Credit Suisse. Ms. Young holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Columbia University.

name: Leila Araiche
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Leila Araiche is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group, responsible for human resources globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Araiche was a Director of HR strategy and operations for Ernst & Young’s transaction practice and a client advisor in its people advisors services, M&A and assurance practices. Ms. Araiche holds a Diploma in Accounting from McGill University, a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Western Ontario and is a CFA charterholder.

name: Len Chersky
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Len Chersky is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group, responsible for investment origination, analysis and execution in the Asia Pacific region. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Mr. Chersky was Executive Director at Lend Lease Corporation. He previously held a number of senior positions in investment banking and financial services as well as executive roles in major listed organizations in Australia. Mr. Chersky holds Bachelor of Science and Bachelor of Law degrees from the University of New South Wales.

name: Li Zhang
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Li Zhang is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he focuses on hospitality investments across Europe. Since joining the firm in 2016, he has worked on global hospitality transactions from both New York and London. Prior to Brookfield, Mr. Zhang worked at ADIA covering lodging investments globally and at Ramsfield Hospitality Finance, a CarVal joint venture. Mr. Zhang holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the School of Hotel Administration at Cornell University.

name: Lief Williams
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Lief Williams is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, he focuses on business development and transaction execution across Brookfield’s infrastructure strategies in North America. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Mr. Williams held successive investment banking roles at a leading investment bank. Mr. Williams holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Alberta.

name: Lindsay Ingram
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Lindsay Ingram is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, she leads debt and equity capital markets activities for the private equity platform globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Ms. Ingram was a Vice President at a multi-strategy private equity firm, where she focused on distressed and opportunistic investing. Prior to that, she was an Associate Director in the Financial Sponsors and Leveraged Finance group at a global investment bank. Ms. Ingram holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the Wharton School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the College of Arts and Sciences at the University of Pennsylvania as part of the Huntsman Program.

name: Lisa Anderson
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Lisa Anderson is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, Ms. Anderson leads the design and execution of innovative financing solutions for insurers and institutional investors, with a focus on capital efficiency and risk transfer strategies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Anderson held senior roles at investment banking institutions including Head of ABS research and Structured Credit business development. Ms. Anderson holds a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Missouri.

name: Lisa Chu
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Lisa Chu is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Finance group, where she oversees all operational and strategic activities within the Controllership team. In addition, she focuses on optimizing global accounting processes and driving efficiencies across the team to support long-term growth and success. Ms. Chu joined Brookfield in 1995 and has held various roles of increasing responsibility leading our Corporate Controllership team based in Toronto. Ms. Chu holds a Master of Business Administration in Professional Accounting and a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Toronto, and she is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Lisa Quick
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Lisa Quick is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, she leads Brookfield’s private funds product development and capital raising initiatives in infrastructure and renewable power & transition. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Ms. Quick was a senior vice president at Macquarie, where she led investor relations for the North American infrastructure private funds. Previously, Ms. Quick held various roles in investor relations, business development and portfolio advisory at investment management firms including Horizon Kinetics, Healey Development and Goldman, Sachs & Co. Ms. Quick holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Stern School of Business at New York University and Bachelor of Science degrees from the University of Florida. Ms. Quick is a Certified Public Accountant in the State of New York.

name: Lluís Noguera
title: Managing Partner | Energy
bio: Lluís Noguera is a Managing Partner and Global Head of Development in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing procurement, commercial and key account management, and supporting development growth, across Brookfield's renewable portfolio companies globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Mr. Noguera was CEO at X-ELIO, a global leader in renewable energy development and a Brookfield-owned company since 2019, and held several senior executive positions in the energy and infrastructure division at Global Power Generation, Gas Natural Fenosa (currently Naturgy) and JPMorgan. Mr. Noguera holds a Master’s degree from the Universitat Politecnica de Catalunya and a Joint Honours Degree from Imperial College London.

name: Lorenzo Lorilla
title: Managing Partner | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Lorenzo Lorilla is a Managing Partner and Chief Investment Officer of Brookfield Wealth Solutions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Lorilla was Deputy Chief Investment Officer of Kuvare Insurance Services, and previously, Head of Credit Investments at Global Atlantic Financial Group as well as its predecessor, the Goldman Sachs Reinsurance Group. Mr. Lorilla holds Master of Engineering and Bachelor of Science degrees from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. Featured Content News InvestmentNews APR 2026 Brookfield Wealth Solutions Lorenzo Lorilla discusses investment opportunities with InvestmentNews

name: Lori Pearson
title: Vice Chair | Brookfield Corporation
bio: Lori Pearson is a Vice Chair of Brookfield Corporation. She also serves as Chair of the Board of Brookfield Wealth Solutions and is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2003, Ms. Pearson was with Ernst and Young, where she held various roles within its audit practice and served on the leadership team for its tax practice. Ms. Pearson holds an Honours Business Administration degree from Western University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant. In 2017, she was named a Fellow by the Chartered Professional Accountants of Ontario. She is on the boards of the Brookfield Foundation and Pathways to Education in Canada and is a past member of the boards of Brookfield Asset Management and Norbord Inc.

name: Lowell Baron
title: CEO | Real Estate
bio: Lowell Baron is Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for investments, operations and the expansion of the real estate business. He also serves as Chief Investment Officer of the Real Estate Group, having previously held the role of President. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2005, Mr. Baron worked at Deutsche Bank, where he focused on real estate private equity and investment banking. Mr. Baron holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Yeshiva University. name: Luiz Ildefonso Simões Lopes
title: Senior Advisor | South America
bio: Luiz Lopes is a Senior Advisor to Brookfield in Brazil, advising on strategic engagements and other initiatives to support business development in the region. Previously, Mr. Lopes was Chief Executive Officer of Brookfield Brazil from 2007 to 2017 and Vice Chair from 2017 to 2025. Prior to joining Brookfield in 1994, Mr. Lopes was Chief Executive Officer and a Director of Magliano CTVM, as well as a Managing Director of Fiat Leasing and Banco Fiat. Mr. Lopes is a member of the Board of Directors of the Brazilian Symphonic Orchestra, the International Advisory Board of Fundação Dom Cabral, a world-renowned executive education center, and the Board of Trustees of Fundação Getúlio Vargas, a leading academic and research center.

name: Luke Edwards

bio: Luke Edwards is Head of Australia and New Zealand for Brookfield’s Energy Group. He is also Head of Japan for Brookfield. In these roles, Mr. Edwards is responsible for the growth and management of renewable power and transition investments in Australia and New Zealand, as well as Brookfield’s overall growth in Japan. Mr. Edwards has previously served in Brookfield’s Infrastructure business, where he focused on investment origination, analysis and execution. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Edwards held various roles across engineering, commercial and investments sectors, including a director position at Citi. He has also held roles at Goldman Sachs in its power, utilities and infrastructure investment banking teams and has experience as a field engineer for Schlumberger in Brazil and Alaska. Mr. Edwards holds Bachelor of Engineering (Civil) and Bachelor of Commerce degrees from the University of Sydney.

name: Lyndsay Hatlelid
title: Managing Partner | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Lyndsay Hatlelid is a Managing Partner and General Counsel of Brookfield Wealth Solutions. In this role, she provides strategic and legal advice across the insurance business, and has oversight of legal, compliance and risk activities within the group. Ms. Hatlelid was previously responsible for legal and transaction execution within Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Hatlelid was a lawyer at a leading Canadian law firm, where her practice focused on corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions and private equity. Ms. Hatlelid holds a Juris Doctor degree from Osgoode Hall Law School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Queen’s University.

name: Madeleine Bourdon
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Madeleine Bourdon is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group, responsible for Human Resources globally. She has held several leadership positions in human resources across the group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2004, Ms. Bourdon worked for an international management consulting firm in organizational development. Ms. Bourdon holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Ottawa, a Bachelor of Science degree from the University of Ottawa and a Bachelor of Business Administration from l’Université du Québec en Outaouais.

name: Marcos Almeida
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Marcos Almeida is a Managing Partner and Head of South America for Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Almeida is responsible for all infrastructure investment and portfolio management activity in the region. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2003, Mr. Almeida worked for an international consulting firm, several accounting firms in Brazil and Switzerland, and for a large bank in Germany. Mr. Almeida holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of São Paulo and a Bachelor’s degree from Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais.

name: Marcus Day
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Marcus Day is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for sourcing, execution and asset management of real estate secondary investments and special situations globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Mr. Day was head of acquisitions Americas for Partners Group. Mr. Day previously held senior investment roles at a U.S. real estate investment manager and a global investment bank. Mr. Day holds Bachelor of Commerce and Bachelor of Laws degrees from the University of New South Wales. name: Marcus Enns
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Marcus Enns is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In this role, he is responsible for the strategy and execution of project and acquisition financing globally. Mr. Enns has held several roles for the group, including overseeing North American capital markets, treasury and financial planning functions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2007, Mr. Enns worked for a large Canadian power utility. Mr. Enns holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the Asper School of Business at the University of Manitoba and is a CFA® charterholder.

name: Marcus Oskarsson
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Marcus Oskarsson is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, he works with European portfolio companies to support their growth and mitigate risk. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Oskarsson held successive investment banking roles at a leading investment bank in London and Sydney. Mr. Oskarsson holds a Master of Science degree from the Stockholm School of Economics.

name: Mark Murski
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Mark Murski is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group and Operating Partner for North America. Mr. Murski is also accountable for leading global asset monetization activities. Mr. Murski joined Brookfield in 2003 focusing on financings, acquisitions, and divestitures. Between 2006 and 2015 he worked for Brookfield Financial, Brookfield’s global advisory practice, where he ran the Mergers & Acquisitions practice. Mr. Murski is a graduate of the Richard Ivey School of Business, a Chartered Professional Accountant, and a CFA charterholder.

name: Mark Srulowitz

In this role, he oversees, and is responsible for, the development and execution of new private fund strategies initiated by Brookfield globally; as well as all legal, tax and regulatory matters for the Global Client Group, including fund formation in particular. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2011, Mr. Srulowitz worked as an attorney in the investment management group of Debevoise & Plimpton, where he advised private fund sponsors in connection with the formation, structuring and negotiation of their investment funds, as well as economic, governance, and related issues. Mr. Srulowitz holds a Juris Doctor degree from the University of Pennsylvania Law School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Yeshiva University. Mr. Srulowitz serves as a committee member of the Private Investment Funds Committee of the New York City Bar Association, which addresses issues, trends and regulations relating to private investment funds. Mr. Srulowitz also serves on the Board of Directors of Kids in Need of Defense.

name: Matt Homan

He also served as CEO of Liberty Diversified International, a privately held paper and packaging company, and served in various roles at Polaris Industries, including President of the Off-Road Vehicle Division. name: Matt Press

name: Matthew Grimes

name: Matthew Hutton

Featured Content Podcast | 16:57 Matthew Hutton MAY 2025 Deal Debrief: NGPL Podcast | 31:21 Ron Bloom, Matthew Hutton APR 2023 Setting the Scene: Deglobalization

name: Matthew Knight
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth

Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Mr. Knight was a managing director within the global wealth management division at Wellington Management, where he led the firm’s private wealth distribution business in the U.K. and Ireland. Prior to his time at Wellington Management, he worked at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, where he was an executive director within the EMEA wealth division. Mr. Knight began his career at Goldman Sachs International as a graduate within the European listed derivatives division. Mr. Knight holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Loughborough University, the Investment Management Certification (IMC), and has completed the Private Markets Impact Investing Programme at the Saïd Business School of University of Oxford.

name: Maybel Marte
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Maybel Marte is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, she is responsible for fundraising initiatives across private credit and multi-asset solutions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Ms. Marte worked at Blackrock, focusing on private credit institutional client coverage and product development, and previously serving as Head of U.S. Leveraged Finance Product Strategy. She has also held roles at PIMCO and Goldman Sachs. Ms. Marte holds a Master of Business Administration degree from The Wharton School and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Wellesley College.

name: Melissa Lang
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Melissa Lang is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for global oversight of the legal aspects of the group’s funds operations, including the execution of investment structuring, fund-level credit facilities, derivative products and other investor matters. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Ms. Lang worked in the real estate group of a large American international law firm focusing on private fund formation. Previously, she was an environmental engineer for the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency. Ms. Lang holds a Juris Doctor degree from the New York University School of Law and a Bachelor of Science degree from the Georgia Institute of Technology.

name: Melissa Low
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Melissa Low is a Managing Director leading Brookfield's Sustainability Management function. In this role, she works closely with all of our business groups in supporting our sustainability initiatives, practices and reporting. Before taking on her current role in 2022, Ms. Low held senior roles focused on Investor Relations and Strategic Initiatives within the Infrastructure Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2011, Ms. Low worked at KPMG in assurance services. Ms. Low holds an Honours Business Administration degree from Western University Ivey Business School and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Melissa Taylor
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Melissa Taylor is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Corporate Group. In this role, she leads the Human Resources function across the Asia Pacific region. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Taylor held roles as an employment lawyer, in-house counsel and HR director across the government, commercial real estate and professional services sectors. Ms. Taylor holds a Master of Business Administration from the Australian Graduate School of Management and Bachelor of Law and Bachelor of Arts degrees from the University of Sydney.

name: Meredith Feiner
title: Managing Director | Corporate Communications & Brand
bio: Meredith Feiner is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Corporate Group. In this role, she leads digital strategy for the corporate brand, shaping the firm’s digital presence, content strategy, and integrated brand campaigns. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Ms. Feiner was on Goldman Sachs’ brand and content strategy team, where she led the firm’s social media marketing and strategy. She’s worked at both blue chip and startup brands, helping redefine their reputations during transformative moments. Ms. Feiner holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Northwestern University.

name: Michael Botha
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Michael Botha is an Operating Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Botha oversees operations, risk management and a variety of asset management activities for Brookfield’s open-ended core infrastructure fund and its portfolio companies. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2001, Mr. Botha worked in the audit practice of a Big Four accounting firm. Mr. Botha holds a Bachelor’s degree from Queen’s University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Michael Layfield
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Michael Layfield is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group.  In this role, he leads the group's tax activities in the U.S. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Layfield was an associate at Debevoise & Plimpton LLP, where his practice focused on private equity transactions and fund formation. Mr. Layfield holds a Juris Doctor degree and a Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Virginia.

name: Michael McRaith
title: Vice Chair | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Michael McRaith is a Managing Partner and Vice Chair of Brookfield Wealth Solutions, participating in all aspects of Brookfield’s global insurance operations. He also serves on the board of directors for Brookfield Wealth Solutions. Prior to joining Brookfield Wealth Solutions in 2021, Mr. McRaith helped build the insurance solutions practice at a global asset manager. He previously served as the first Director of the Federal Insurance Office in the U.S. Department of the Treasury, where he held national and global leadership roles. Before joining Treasury, he served as the Director of the Illinois Department of Insurance and as an officer of the National Association of Insurance Commissioners. Prior to his public service, Mr. McRaith was a partner in the Chicago office of a global law firm, and he remains a member of the Trial Bar for the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Illinois. Mr. McRaith holds a Juris Doctor degree from Loyola University of Chicago’s School of Law and a Bachelor of Arts degree from Indiana University. He received the Distinguished LGBTQ Alumnus Award from Indiana University, the Exceptional Service Award from the U.S. Department of the Treasury, and is a Distinguished Fellow of the International Association of Insurance Supervisors. Mr. McRaith is a member of The Bretton Woods Committee. Featured Content Podcast | 24:36 Sachin Shah, Jon Bayer, Michael McRaith DEC 2023 Special Episode: Understanding the Insurance Industry

name: Michael Rudnick
title: Managing Director | Private Equity

Mr. Rudnick began his career as a restructuring associate at Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison LLP. Mr. Rudnick holds a Juris Doctor degree from the Benjamin N. Cardozo School of Law and Bachelor of Arts degree from Emory University.

Mr. Ryan joined Brookfield in 2010, following Brookfield’s acquisition of the Australian listed company, Prime Infrastructure, where he served as general counsel and company secretary. Prior to this role, he was an associate at a leading law firm. Mr. Speer holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Bishop’s University and is a CFA charterholder.

Bristol and a Partner at Isomer Partners.  In these roles, he focused on public equity investing. name: Mihir Nerurkar

Prior to joining Brookfield, he held leadership roles with a boutique financial services firm and a leading real estate firm in India. Mr. Nerurkar holds a Master’s degree from Syracuse University and a Bachelor’s degree from University of Pune, India.

He’d held several alternative investment and client relationship management roles during his tenure. Mr. Wiedemeijer holds a Master of Economics degree from St. Gallen University (HSG).

Ms. Ahmed holds a Master of Management and Professional Accounting from the University of Toronto, Rotman School of Management, a Bachelor of Administrative and Commercial Studies degree from Western University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

Mr. Ahmed holds Bachelor of Business Administration and Master of Professional Accounting degrees from the McCombs School of Business at University of Texas at Austin.

In this role, he markets private, semi-liquid, and public investment solutions to high-net-worth investors and advisors in the region. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Isoba served in a similar role at a global investment manager.  Before that, he was a managing director at a global asset management firm overseeing the firm’s retail and institutional sales and marketing efforts in the Americas region. Mr. Isoba holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Montclair State University.

Previously, Mr. Dobbs worked at Bank of America Merrill Lynch in the real estate investment banking group. Mr. Dobbs holds a Bachelor of Science in Business Administration from Washington and Lee University.

In this role, Mr. Taylor directs all capital markets activities for the business, including accounting, financial reporting, treasury, taxation and investor relations on a global basis. Mr. Taylor joined Brookfield in 2011, and since then has held a number of senior finance roles across the organization including Chief Financial Officer of its European infrastructure group based in London and Chief Financial Officer of an integrated logistics portfolio company in the U.K. and mainland Europe. Previously, Patrick was a longstanding member of the infrastructure finance leadership team in Toronto, where he held various roles across financial reporting, fund finance and operations and portfolio management. Prior to joining Brookfield, Mr. Taylor was in the audit group at KPMG. Mr. Taylor holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

Mr. Forestell holds Bachelor of Science and Master of Arts degrees from the University of Toronto and is a Fellow of the Canadian Institute of Actuaries and the Society of Actuaries.

In this role, he is responsible for due diligence, operational and financial performance of Brookfield target and portfolio companies broadly, with particular focus on the healthcare, technology and software sectors. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2021, Mr. Lepage served as President and CEO of Intelerad Medical Systems. He was previously President of TELUS Health and Payment Solutions and Chairman of TELUS Ventures. He also was President and CEO of MediSolution (a Brookfield Portfolio Company). Mr. Lepage holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the John Molson School of Business at Concordia University, a Bachelor of Industrial Engineering degree from École Polytechnique at University of Montreal and the ICD.D designation from the Rotman School of Management at University of Toronto. In 2016, Mr. Lepage received an honorary doctorate from the University of Montreal for his contributions in the fields of engineering, technology innovation and health IT.

Mr. Garcia also worked as a corporate and M&A lawyer at Pinheiro Neto Law Firm in Brazil. Mr. Garcia holds a post-graduate (1995) degree in Corporate Law from Pontifícia Catholic University of Rio de Janeiro (PUC), and graduated in Law from PUC in 1990. Mr. Garcia also took part of the Advanced Management Program of Fundação Dom Cabral/INSEAD in 2006.

name: Paulo Mazzali

Mr. Mazzali holds a Master of Business Administration degree from The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania and a Bachelor's degree from the University of São Paulo.

Before this, Ms. Elder worked at international law firms in Australia and the U.K. where she focused on corporate finance. Ms. Elder holds a Bachelor of Laws degree from King’s College London.

Mr. Roberts holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Oxford University. He is a Chartered Accountant and a Chartered Tax Adviser.

name: Pooja Aggarwal

name: Rachit Kothari

Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, he worked in a large global alternative asset manager in their real estate acquisitions team. Mr. Kothari holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Indian Institute of Management, Bangalore and a Bachelor of Technology degree from the Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur.

Mr. O’Neal holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Indiana University and is a CFA charterholder.

Mr. Rashid holds a Bachelor of Mathematics degree from the University of Waterloo and is a member of the Canadian Institute of Chartered Professional Accountants. name: Simon Maine
title: Managing Director | Corporate Communications & Brand
bio: Simon Maine is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Corporate Communications & Brand group. In this role, he is responsible for the development and execution of strategic communications plans in Europe, as well as for the Renewable Power & Transition and Infrastructure businesses globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Maine was director of corporate affairs for Ovo Energy and a partner at Brunswick Group. Mr. Maine holds a Master of Arts degree from the University of Oxford.

name: Sir Ron Kalifa
title: Vice Chair, Private Equity | Head of Financial Infrastructure Investing
bio: Sir Ron Kalifa is Vice Chair and Head of Financial Infrastructure investing in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. In this role, he is responsible for Brookfield’s financial infrastructure investment strategy which focuses on identifying opportunities in digital assets and services that form the backbone of the global economy. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Sir Ron served as CEO of Worldpay for over a decade, a leading global payments platform overseeing its divestment into private equity ownership and subsequently to IPO. He also served as Chair of Network International, a leading payments operator across the Middle East and Africa that was acquired by a Brookfield-led consortium. In 2021, he led the Kalifa Review of U.K. Fintech, a government-commissioned independent review which defined a strategy and delivery model for fintech and high-growth sectors of the economy. Throughout his career, he has held senior roles in finance across the U.K., Europe, and the U.S. Sir Ron is an alumnus of Harvard Business School. He also serves as a member of the Council of Imperial College London, a Trustee of the Royal Foundation, and a Non-Executive Director for the England and Wales Cricket Board and InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG). Featured Content News Financial News SEP 2025 Why Ron Kalifa wants to bring finance out of the analogue age News Bloomberg JUL 2025 Brookfield eyes more money moving infrastructure assets Podcast | 29:04 Anuj Ranjan, Sir Ron Kalifa FEB 2024 Deep Dive: A Financial Infrastructure Evolution

name: Sophia Hanna
title: Operating Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Sophia Hanna is an Operating Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Hanna is responsible for information technology and cybersecurity due diligence processes across infrastructure and private equity. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Ms. Hanna held various information technology executive roles in the logistics, automotive, manufacturing, publishing, telecommunication, wholesale and retail industries. Ms. Hanna holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Edinburgh Graduate School and a Bachelor’s degree from the University of Toronto. Ms. Hanna is a Professional Engineer and a Chartered Accountant.

name: Sophia Rihani
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Sophia Rihani is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group and head of transaction execution for the Asia Pacific and Middle East regions. Ms. Rihani is responsible for the negotiation and execution of large-scale complex transactions spanning public and private mergers and acquisitions, capital raisings, restructures, joint ventures and major projects. She is also actively involved in portfolio management and governance, and serves as a board member for the Healthscope private hospital group. Ms. Rihani holds Master of Laws and Bachelor of Arts degrees from the Australian National University and a Graduate Certificate from Macquarie University.

name: Sophie Fallman
title: Managing Partner | Global Client Group
bio: Sophie Fallman is Head of Asia Pacific for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, she is responsible for global fundraising strategies and private institutional investors across the region.  Previously, Ms. Fallman was the Head of Australia for Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and prior to that was Chief Operating Officer of Brookfield’s private real estate funds, based in New York. Before joining Brookfield in 2010, Ms. Fallman was the fund manager of a core-plus institutional real estate fund in Sydney, where she gained experience in asset management, development management and corporate property acquisitions. Ms. Fallman holds a Master of Finance degree from Financial Services Institute of Australasia, a Bachelor of Architecture degree from RMIT University and has completed the Program for Leadership Development at Harvard Business School.

name: Sridhar Rengan
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Sridhar Rengan is a Managing Director of Brookfield. In this role, he has primary responsibility for overseeing the company’s scalable corporate operations platform, which supports Brookfield globally from Powai, India. Mr. Rengan joined Brookfield in 2014 and has since held multiple senior leadership positions across the firm and its affiliates, including prior roles overseeing finance and capital markets activities for Brookfield in India. Mr. Rengan holds a Bachelor of Commerce (Honours) from St. Xavier’s College, Kolkata, and a Bachelor of Law from the University of Kolkata. He is also a member of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India and the Institute of Company Secretaries of India.

name: Stefano Ghezzi
title: Managing Director | Energy
bio: Stefano Ghezzi is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Energy Group. In his role as Regional Head for Southeast Asia, he leads investment and broader business activities in the region, including deploying capital across markets that support the Catalytic Transition Fund. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Mr. Ghezzi was a director in the infrastructure and natural resources team at Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan. Mr. Ghezzi holds a Master of Science degree from the Warwick Business School and a Bachelor of Science degree from the Università Cattolica del Sacro Cuore.

name: Stephen Fukuda
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Stephen Fukuda is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Fukuda leads strategic and investor-focused initiatives for both Brookfield Infrastructure Partners and the Infrastructure Private Funds. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2022, Mr. Fukuda worked for a Canadian energy infrastructure company in a leadership position within the finance and capital markets group. Mr. Fukuda holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Calgary and the Chartered Financial Analyst designation.

name: Stewart Upson
title: Managing Partner and President | Infrastructure
bio: Stewart Upson is President of Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, he is responsible for regional oversight in Asia Pacific, leading investment strategy, and supporting the screening and evaluation of global investment initiatives. Mr. Upson also serves as Brookfield’s Regional Head of Asia Pacific, overseeing the Asset Manager’s business activities in the region, and as Head of Global Strategy, with responsibility for identifying, implementing and investing in new technologies across the organization. He is a member of Brookfield’s Executive Committee. Mr. Upson joined Brookfield in 2010 following Brookfield’s acquisition of the Australian-listed company, Prime Infrastructure, where he held several senior roles. He previously served as Treasurer at a New Zealand-based utility. Mr. Upson holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Auckland and is a CFA charterholder. name: Susan Elolampi
title: Managing Director | Global Head of Family Investors
bio: Susan Elolampi is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Global Client Group. As Global Head of Family Investors, she is responsible for developing partnerships with, as well as Brookfield’s coverage strategy for, leading family investors worldwide. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Ms. Elolampi was Head of Family Coverage for UBS and worked on control and minority investment transactions in corporates and real estate. She also founded the family coverage group at JPMorgan and previously covered U.S. and European financial sponsors. Ms. Elolampi holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the University of Chicago Booth School of Business and a Bachelor of Science degree from Bucknell University.

name: Suzanne Fleming
title: Managing Partner | Corporate Communications & Brand
bio: Suzanne Fleming is Global Head of Corporate Communications & Brand for Brookfield. In this role, she is responsible for the firm’s public relations, branding, corporate marketing and internal communications globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in June 2015, she was a Managing Director in corporate communications at Credit Suisse. She also worked in corporate communications at Morgan Stanley, both in New York and Hong Kong. Ms. Fleming holds a Bachelor of Arts (Hons) degree from Huron College at Western University in Canada. She is on the board of Huron College.

name: Suzanne Jackson
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Suzanne Jackson is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Corporate Group. In this role, she is Head of HR for Brookfield Asset Management in Europe and leads HR for our Energy Group in the region. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2012, Ms. Jackson worked at an infrastructure services company as an HR business partner. Ms. Jackson holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Staffordshire University.

name: Swarup Katuri
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Swarup Katuri is a Managing Partner and Head of Housing in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, Mr. Katuri is responsible for strategic investment management and business development, investment activity, asset management oversight, and effective disposition strategies within the housing sector globally. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Katuri worked at Associated Estates Realty Corp (AEC), where he was a member of the senior management team that led the sale of AEC to Brookfield. Mr. Katuri holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Fuqua School of Business at Duke University, where he graduated as a Fuqua Scholar, and Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Science degrees from Case Western Reserve University.

name: Swati Mandava
title: Managing Director | Legal & Regulatory
bio: Swati Mandava is Legal Counsel and Corporate Secretary for Brookfield Corporation. In this role, she is responsible for providing legal advice in relation to existing and new initiatives of the Corporation, serving as Corporate Secretary to the Board of Directors of the Corporation, and having oversight of legal and compliance activities. Ms. Mandava joined Brookfield in 2015 and has held several roles including serving as senior lawyer for Brookfield’s India and Middle East business. Prior to joining Brookfield, she worked for a leading corporate law firm in India, where she focused on mergers and acquisitions, private equity and advising on a variety of corporate transactions. Ms. Mandava holds a dual Bachelor of Arts and Law degree from NALSAR, University of Law in Hyderabad, India.

name: Talora Farovitch
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Talora Farovitch is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for the Canadian tax implications of global real estate transactions, structures, and strategic and legislative initiatives. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2014, Ms. Farovitch was a senior manager in the international tax practice at PricewaterhouseCoopers. Ms. Farovitch holds a Bachelor of Laws degree from the University of Manitoba and a Master of Taxation from the University of Waterloo.

name: Tara Newbery
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Tara Newbery is a Managing Director in the Legal and Regulatory group for Brookfield's Private Wealth group. In this role, she is responsible for coverage of the EMEA and Asia Pacific regions. Prior to joining Brookfield in June 2023, Ms. Newbery was head of legal in EMEA for Northern Trust Asset Management. Previously she was head of legal for PGIM Investments following legal roles at Pinebridge and Legg Mason. Ms. Newbery qualified as a solicitor in 2004 and attained the Certified Investment Fund Director qualification in 2013.

name: Tatsuro Aoyama
title: Managing Director | Private Wealth
bio: Tatsuro Aoyama is a Managing Director for Brookfield’s Private Wealth Group. In this role, he is responsible for developing and managing strategic partnerships with domestic financial institutions and distributors throughout Japan. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2025, Mr. Aoyama spent two years at Partners Group and previously held senior roles at BlackRock. He has decades of experience in the asset management industry, with a focus on private wealth and retail distribution across global and domestic markets. Mr. Aoyama holds a Bachelor of Laws degree from Nagoya University.

name: Ted Berklayd
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Ted Berklayd is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for the active management, growth and strategic direction for Brookfield's European real estate investments. Mr. Berklayd joined Brookfield in 2011, as part of the corporate finance group, before heading the European finance team, and later the portfolio management team. Prior to Brookfield, Mr. Berklayd was a senior associate for Duff & Phelps’ transaction advisory services group in New York. Mr. Berklayd holds a Bachelor of Science degree from New York University’s Stern School of Business and is a Certified Public Accountant (license expired).

name: Ted Hanno
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Ted Hanno is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group and serves as the Chief Financial Officer of Brookfield REIT. Prior to his current role, he was the Chief Accounting Officer for Brookfield REIT and Controller for Brookfield’s open-end U.S. core-plus fund. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Hanno held various finance positions at Guggenheim Partners and TA Realty, as well as roles within the audit practice of Caturano and Company. Mr. Hanno holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Boston College and a Master of Science degree from the University of Massachusetts Amherst. He is also a Certified Public Accountant.

name: Theo Buchsbaum
title: Managing Director | Global Client Group
bio: Theo Buchsbaum is a Managing Director and Head of the Mid-Atlantic and Central U.S. for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, he is responsible for equity-oriented relationships and capital raising activities across those U.S. regions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Buchsbaum held various investment banking roles at Barclays and The Carlyle Group. Mr. Buchsbaum holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Columbia University.

name: Thomas Tates
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Thomas Tates is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Mr. Tates is responsible for leading the human resources function for the infrastructure business. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2015, Mr. Tates held progressively senior human resources roles in Canada and the U.S. with a leading retailer of energy services. Mr. Tates holds a Master’s degree in industrial relations and human resources from the University of Toronto, and a Bachelor of Commerce from the Toronto Metropolitan University.

name: Todd Roland
title: Managing Director | Private Equity
bio: Todd Roland is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group. He is a member of the Brookfield Sponsor Solutions (BSS) team with responsibility for investment origination, analysis and execution across a variety of sectors in North America. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2023, Mr. Roland was an executive director at GCM Grosvenor in its direct and co-investment private equity business. He previously was a vice president at Houlihan Lokey, where he served as lead manager on advisory assignments for public and private clients. Mr. Roland holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Indiana University where he graduated summa cum laude.

name: Tom Miller
title: Managing Director | Public Securities
bio: Tom Miller is a Managing Director and Portfolio Manager on the Infrastructure Securities team for Brookfield’s Public Securities Group. In this role he oversees and contributes to the portfolio construction process, including execution of buy/sell decisions. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2013, Mr. Miller worked at FactSet Research Systems working with institutional investment managers to incorporate portfolio analytics and risk management tools into their respective investment processes. Mr. Miller holds the Chartered Financial Analyst designation and earned a Bachelor of Science degree from Indiana University.

name: Tomohide Yokooka
title: Managing Director | Brookfield Wealth Solutions
bio: Tomohide Yokooka is a Managing Director and Head of Brookfield Wealth Solutions in Japan. In this role, Mr. Yokooka is responsible for establishing partnerships with insurance companies in Japan. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Mr. Yokooka worked in M&A advisory and capital raising services for more than 20 years at Barclays, Citi and Goldman Sachs in Tokyo and New York. Mr. Yokooka holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Michigan Ross School of Business and a Bachelor of Arts, Economics degree from Waseda University. He is a Certified Public Accountant in Japan.

name: Trevor Tuck
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Trevor Tuck is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Infrastructure Group. In this role, he works with North American and European portfolio companies to support their growth and mitigate risk. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2024, Mr. Tuck served as Chief Operating Officer of a technology and services provider, and was previously responsible for the execution of the Darlington Nuclear Refurbishment megaproject in Canada. Mr. Tuck holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the York University Schulich School of Business and a Bachelor of Applied Science degree from the University of Windsor.

name: Tristan Tully
title: Managing Partner | Private Equity
bio: Tristan Tully is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Private Equity Group and heads the private equity business for Brookfield in Europe. In this role, Mr. Tully is responsible for private equity strategy, including deal sourcing, execution and portfolio monitoring in the region. Mr. Tully joined Brookfield in 2014, and since then has held a number of roles. Prior to Brookfield, he was an associate at a global private equity group and began his career as an analyst at an investment bank. Mr. Tully holds a Bachelor of Arts degree from Wesleyan University.

name: Udhay Mathialagan
title: Managing Partner | Infrastructure
bio: Udhay Mathialagan is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group and the CEO of the Global Data Center group. In this role, Mr. Mathialagan is responsible for asset management of our existing data center assets. Mr. Mathialagan is also the Data Sector Head for Asia Pacific. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Mathialagan was the Chief Executive Officer of a global telecom portfolio management software company in Singapore. Mr. Mathialagan has held leadership positions in investment management, infrastructure and growth businesses in telecommunications and technology sectors in Asia Pacific and Europe. Mr. Mathialagan holds a Master of Business Administration degree from Rotterdam School of Management, Erasmus University, the Netherlands and is currently Chair of the Board of DCI. Featured Content News Infrastructure Investor JAN 2026 Stewart Upson and Udhay Mathialagan on how infrastructure is adapting in the AI revolution Podcast | 27:21 Olivier Micheli, Udhay Mathialagan JAN 2024 Setting the Scene: Digitalization Podcast | 27:21 Olivier Micheli, Udhay Mathialagan JAN 2024 Mise en scène : Numérisation

name: Venkat Kannan
title: Managing Director | Credit
bio: Venkat Kannan is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Credit Group. In this role, he oversees the functions within the investment operations team. He also manages certain private fund operational teams in Brookfield’s regional offices. Mr. Kannan previously led the financial planning and analysis team, as well as managed the finance and operations function for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2019, Mr. Kannan held progressively senior roles in Toronto and Singapore at Canadian asset management firm Mackenzie Investments. He was previously a part of the audit and assurance practice at Deloitte in Toronto and Hong Kong. Mr. Kannan holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of Toronto and is a member of the Chartered Professional Accountants of Canada.

name: Vincent Kerboull
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Vincent Kerboull is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he is responsible for originating and executing investments in France and Benelux. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Kerboull worked for Blackstone in its European real estate group and at Lazard Freres & Co. in Paris. Mr. Kerboull holds a Master of Finance degree from ESCP Europe and a Master of Civil Engineering degree from ESTP Paris. Featured Content Podcast | 20:50 Becky Lumlock, Gabriele Montesi, Vincent Kerboull JUL 2024 What Does It Take to Bring the Olympic Games to Life?

name: Vishal Padiyar
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Vishal Padiyar is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, he works with European portfolio companies to support their growth and mitigate risk. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2018, Mr. Padiyar held executive roles with major telecommunication providers. Mr. Padiyar holds a Master of Business Administration degree from the Ivey Business School at Western University, a Master in Engineering degree from Texas A&M University and a Bachelor of Science degree from Rutgers University.

name: Waldo Szczupak
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Waldo Szczupak is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he focuses on investments in the student housing, manufactured housing, single-family rental and build-to-rent sectors. Mr. Szczupak previously worked in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2011, Mr. Szczupak worked in the infrastructure investment banking business of a global financial institution. Mr. Szczupak holds a Master of Finance degree from INSEAD and Bachelor of Science degree from MIT.

name: Winnie Kong
title: Managing Director | Infrastructure
bio: Winnie Kong is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Infrastructure Group. In this role, Ms. Kong is responsible for tax structuring In Australia and Asia Pacific as well as portfolio company management. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2007, Ms. Kong held roles with an Australian power company and a leading accounting firm. Ms. Kong holds a Master of Taxation Law from the University of Sydney and a Bachelor of Commerce, Accounting and Finance degree from the University of New South Wales. Ms. Kong is also member of the Chartered Accountants Institute in Australia.

name: Wyatt Hartley
title: Managing Partner and Co-President | Energy
bio: Wyatt Hartley is a Managing Partner and Head of North American Asset Management of Brookfield’s Energy Group. He is also Co-President of Brookfield Renewable Partners. In this role, he is responsible for overseeing portfolio companies and leading the growth of our platform in the United States. Mr. Hartley has held several senior positions across the organization, including most recently Chief Financial Officer of the Energy Group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2010, Mr. Hartley worked at a big-four accounting firm where he qualified as a Chartered Professional Accountant. Mr. Hartley holds a Bachelor of Science degree from Queen’s University.

name: Xiate Li
title: Managing Partner | Global Client Group
bio: Xiate Li is a Managing Partner and Head of Greater China for Brookfield’s Global Client Group. In this role, Ms. Li is responsible for equity and credit-oriented client relationships and capital raising activities across Greater China. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2020, Ms. Li was an investment director at a well-known large insurance asset management company in China. Before that, Ms. Li held several positions at China International Capital Corporation. Ms. Li holds a Master's degree from Imperial College London with Distinction and a Bachelor of Finance degree from Fudan University.

name: Yiwen Yang
title: Managing Director | Real Estate
bio: Yiwen Yang is a Managing Director in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, she is responsible for the strategic management of property portfolios, as well as ongoing acquisitions, dispositions and the management of real estate within the group. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, Ms. Yang held various roles with CapitaLand, Tesco Property and AMP Capital where she gained experience in research, investment analysis, leasing, operation and asset management. Ms. Yang holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from the University of New South Wales, Sydney.

name: Zachary Cohn
title: Managing Partner | Real Estate
bio: Zachary Cohn is a Managing Partner in Brookfield’s Real Estate Group. In this role, he leads capital markets activities throughout the U.S. Previously, he held various roles within the Real Estate Group, including sourcing, underwriting, structuring and execution of debt investments. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2016, he worked at Citi, where he was responsible for the underwriting, origination and structuring of commercial real estate debt investments. Mr. Cohn holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Southern California.

name: Zaki Abbas
title: Managing Director | Corporate
bio: Zaki Abbas is a Managing Director in Brookfield's Corporate Group. In this role, he serves as Brookfield’s Chief Information Security Officer and partners with global business groups to lead enterprise information security, technology risk and compliance, as well as technology architecture and solution design. Prior to joining Brookfield in 2017, Mr. Abbas led cybersecurity functions at leading insurance organizations. Mr. Abbas holds a Bachelor's degree from York University.
